I remember in fourth grade i was severely depressed and i told this one girl. she ended up telling the principal. i just remember crying in his office. he told me he would get in contact with my mother even though i begged him not to. i come back home from school that day and she comes up and says to me "your principal gave me a call today. what the fuck was that about? You have no clue what you are even talking about". at the moment i kind of knew that i could never tell anyone anything. they either tell others or just don't believe me. for the majority of my life i have been on my own. my father is thousands of miles away with his new perfect family and im stuck with my mother who would never give me attention. i never got the sex talk from her, she never told me what a period is. she never taught me  how to braid my hair. that hurts. i was chronically online for years. i made friends from video games, they made me feel validated. i really liked the feeling. it was new to me. as i kept getting older i had realized that something is truly wrong with me, i still can't figure out what it is till this day. i have so many things i can say but when it's time for me to speak i crawl up in a ball and at that point words can come out of my mouth. i always push away the good things in my life because i am not used to being treated good. of course i feel terrible for doing so and it pains me each time, but i cant help it. being treated like a human being is just something im not used to. im invisible for more than half the time. why would it matter what i feel or want to say? there are people in your life who's opinion is way more important to you than mine, mine doesn't even matter. as i am writing this i just realized that i got left on read by my own boyfriend. he is currently drunk at a bar. it hurts, yet i can't tell him to go home, that would be selfish. he can go to bars but i cant. i know he doesnt trust me, it hurts that i know that. even after my family spent thousands of dollars to go meet him he will never trust me, but that's not his fault. it's my fault. it's always my fault.

He keeps looking back at me when he does his goofy things or whatever. I guess to see if I elicit a reaction. But now at the end of the day, since this class is my last period, he does the same cringe stuff like he always does and goes, "wsg cutie". Then he nods his head and looks embarrassed and disappointed. BUT NOW THAT IM THINKING ABOUT IT, I FEEL SO BAD LIKE WHAT THE HECK.

Dear Jabniel,
If you’re reading this know that there are a lot of things I wish I could say to you. 

First off I’ll start with this, I loved you. A lot. You were my first love… and my first heartbreak. And I wish I would’ve told you before it was too late. 

Second, you hurt me. We both royally screwed up. You because you lied to me, ditched me for other people (blowing off our plans for the Busch Gardens trip to hang out with Lillith was a crappy thing to do. I would’ve kissed you there given the chance), and ultimately weren’t there for me during one of the worst times in my life. It’s my best guess that you needed space because you thought you needed to get over me. (Spoiler alert, you didn’t. I was so into you I couldn’t sleep sometimes.) 

But I wish you would have at least told me you needed space but that you were gonna come back. My mental health during that summer was pretty bottom of the barrel and you used to be my ray of hope. I really needed you, Jabniel. I know you were in Puerto Rico and you were with your family so you were busy, but you spent a LOT of time on Roblox for someone whose internet was “unreliable”. 

But I take responsibility for my part in the screwed up situationship too. Because I see why you thought I didn’t like you back. I gave you crazy mixed signals. I asked you for advice about other guys and I friendzoned you multiple times (which, I want to clarify was only ever a defense mechanism). Seriously, when I told you it “wasn’t like that” after we held hands for the first time it was only because I thought I had royally screwed up. Which was because YOU turned to Lillith and asked her if it wouldn’t be weird if you held your friend’s hand. Plus I also should have reached out closer to the beginning of the school year when it maybe wasn’t too late still. I might still try to talk to you again. If you want to text me, I did unblock you.

Remember that time on the way back from lunch when we were pretend-shipping our friends? When you pretend-shipped us and it was getting a little too serious so I said that I loved being friends with you but I didn’t like you like that and you said “I understand”- did you already like me? I didn’t have feelings for you yet. And I want to know, is that why Stella forced you to end the friendship before? Was it because you liked me and she was jealous?

Third, I hope you aren’t still so insecure about the way you look. You’re incredibly handsome, honestly. I was shocked when you started picking apart your appearance in front of the camera that day in art class. To me, you were hot. Honestly you still are. Don’t tell my friends, they try to convince me to stand on business and not talk to you again. Because you might not be good idea. But I just can’t let you go, Jabniel. 

Fourth, I still think about you almost every day. I pray for you, even when it’s hard.

Fifth, if you’re down for it I would still consider being with you. I see you in the halls every day and I just think, that could be us. I want to give this a proper shot because I already regret letting you get away and I miss you so much. Seriously, text me. I’m gonna reply this time. Also I think I’m just gonna text you first because the chances of you seeing this are incredibly slim. 

Sixth, when I say my mental health was bad this summer I mean it was BAD. The heartbreak was part of it, I cried just about every day over you. I didn’t know how I was ever going to be okay again without you. Some days, I’m still not. 

Seventh, can I please have the pictures of you back? I deleted them and I wish I didn’t

I'm really starting to understand the meaning of liquid smooth by Mitski. It's frustrating. I've broken up with Jafaru, and I should be enjoying my freedom, but it feels like ever since I've broken up, I've just had to deal with every bad emotion I've pushed away ever since I started dating him. I have felt so lonely it's not funny, and I feel like I'm becoming so desperate for love and a connection that I'm looking for it in the most stupidest places. 

Well not really because love isn't something I want, well at least not right now because I've never been able to give myself the love I shared with Jafaru. But it just seems like, Sex has been so awful recently it's not funny. 

I feel like I'm pressuring myself to have a hookup because it makes me feel like it'd be the only way I could forget about jafaru, and at least help my romantic feelings for him just, die out. But all it's done has made me worse and push me to having an existential crisis because the men I let use my body have been so disgusting in personality. 

They don't care about my needs, all they care about is having another person to ride. All I ever asked was to feel safe and comfortable, and to wear a condom, but it feels like I'm a baby when I do this. When I'm anxious, I'm met with people acting like IM the weird one for expressing some form of being uncomfortable.  It was so dehumanizing and weird.  Like I get that hookups are *supposed* to not have romantic feelings attached to them, but it just felt like they did NOT care about me in any way shape or form. Seeing them smoke meth in front of, as they talked to me as if I was a kid, made fun of my fear of the dark, and ranting about personal space to me, it made me feel so guilty it made me want to cry. The fact I even let him use me unprotected is something I regret because I promised my mom I'd always stay protected. I am ashamed of myself....so so so ashamed, and disgusted 

but now my need for satisfaction has just, grown more....I'm told I should just leave hookups alone, but a part of my mind still wants to play the game, A part of me still wants to believe that I'm actually *not* on the ace spectrum, I just haven't, met the right guy yet. 

I try to fool myself into thinking that sex with myself is just as gratifying but it isn't. After a while it just reminds me of how alone I truly am because I can't find someone who actually gives a thought as to how I'm feeling, instead of just rambling about "how taking prep means I don't need to use a condom" even tho every gay person I've ever seen tells me that taking prep doesn't mean they CANT CATCH anything, plus the stories I hear from my mom about men lying about their test results in order to get a one up on someone just makes me scared

Why are people like this, so fucking selfish, so fucking awful to one another? and why am I so fucking dumb for feeding my brain this??? Why do I try to make hookups a good thing for me? When all it has, is make me an awkward anxious mess. Today, I was supposed to be celebrating my birthday and high school graduation— my family and I were going to visit a place I've wanted to see for years, and I've been excitedly planning for months in advance. I canceled it because my dad insisted on changing our plans and the location to somewhere he preferred. A place six hours away from home, with weather that would make my chronic illness flare up, and one I've never been interested in— the location I chose was important to me because it's the only aquarium in the US with whale sharks, and a nearby museum with exhibits of actual mummies and ancient pottery. He got passive aggressive when I said I wasn't interested in changing the plans for him, and my mom tried to convince me to go along with it. I cried for days.

Only my mom even celebrated my birthday last week. I baked my own cake, and she gave me a notebook and some clothes. My dad complained the cake didn't have enough brown sugar on it. We have plans for me to maybe get a pet soon, as a late birthday present, but nothing's happened yet and I still don't have any supplies.

I've spent most of today laying in bed, mostly, because I'm upset about what happened. They still had today and yesterday off of work because they hadn't changed it after I canceled the plans. Every time I sit at the kitchen table, I have to listen to my dad complain about everything, blame me for his problems, or go on drunk rants about conspiracy theories. First of all I apologise for bad English or grammar I'm a German native. 

I will just make a biography of my life I guess... Speaking a bit... Telling my struggles and questions I don't have a answer for.

I don't even know where to begin. I'm 17 years old and carry depression for years now. My life began in an rather poor family. My mother was 17 and 18 when I was born. My father left quickly after he found out saying "I want you but not the damn child." My father also used to beat her a few tkmes. Atleast that is what I was told. 

My mother was from there on jobless. I was told that my Grandma (Maternal side) used to beat me on my hands and fingers for grabbing the remote and other things. I skip the kindergarten time because I don't really remember anything from that time.

I was in two different schools before I had the "Final" one to attend the first grade. On day one I was bullied. A guy double my size snatched my backpack away and I cried violently to myself. I don't know why but that is one of many things that just burned into my memory. I also had to repeat second grade.

Until fourth grade I always had two girl a class above me that always looked after me and played with me... Those two were like my angels always caring for me and spending time with me. Although I always had to ask a teacher to then ask them if I could play with them.

Then I was alone. No friends. Nothing. In fourth grade I switched classes where I found a few new ones and one person that I despise the most but more to him later.

The last day of the Fourth grade I waved to two girls and they waved back with a big smile... Everyday I thought of them and was so excited to see them again after sommer Holidays. 

When I came in (5th grade) they completely ignored me. No smile just coldness and they treated me like I was the most disgusting pervert on this planet. I felt crushed. They were manipulated by "Kevin" (that name is made up that's not his real name.)

I had 3 Buddy's. No friends. I never had someone I could turn to or trust they were just buddy's to spend time with. Until sixth grade I was bullied to my core. By girls and boys. My grades were hell. My School certificate had a average note qoute of 5,6. Then I finally met my father for the first time... Not knowing the terror he inflicted on my mother. 

I first thought he was exited as I was... He played with me and even brought my grades in track again. First he played with me and spent time with me even bringing my notes back on track. Then he slowly started giving my mother more attention then me... To much...

He spended a lot of money on my mother and then using that to say "Look what I have done for you and this is what I get?!" Or "You wouldnt even have a house without me right now!" He manipulated me... Against her. I thought as a 13 year old that my father was right... 

... Then a day in school came. I don't know why it even accoured but it did. School director. Class teacher. youth welfare office. And the school therapist combined with me my mother and father at one big table. That day I made the "Wish" that I want to move to my father. 

My mother didn't reacted at all. She was like dead. But at home she completely went berserk. She broke kicking and hitting my father's car for good reasons. He drove away and not long after that I moved to my father without contact to my mother for 7 months. 

In that time I have met my paternal side family. My father couldn't have cared less for me and the day I was there my depression got really going. 

I couldn't really tell what it was but I felt different... Everyday the same. Sad. Cold. Scared. Anxious. Spectated. Judged. And pure self hatred and suicide thoughts. 

Over the course of the next two and a half years I got incredibly anxious and paranoid because of my father. I didn't knew it yet but I was scared of him. My father didn't give a damn for me. He never only once had spent time with me. He taught me nothing I was just a buddy to be there. 

For some reason I always wanted to go to a therapist. I knew something was off with me and I WANTED help but he didn't care much saying "You need to know Why what's going on with you or else you can't go to a therapist" which is obviously bollocks. 

Then on May this year I broke. The day before I was looking up the internet and made some tests. "Do you have PTSD?" "Are you suicidal?" And so on.

I couldn't sleep. And it only took 3 hours in school for me to snap. My vision was going black and I broke down mentally crying. I had a Panic attack lasting for over 2 and a half hours. With an ambulance I was brought to a mental health thingy and I immediately wanted to go back home. I lied to the staff saying I was good and wanted to go home.

Then my father finally searched for a therapist only because my mother made pressure on him. While I was going to therapy my father forced me to go in school. He didn't care nor understood my situation he only cared about getting back together with my mother even saying "Don't tell anything about this your mom or she may never want me again!!!"

My therapist helped me realise that I was manipulated by my father all time long who has the perfect mask on the outside but is actually a monster.

With the help of my uncle, grandma, and aunt i fled to them moving in with them... Only to be disowned 5 weeks later.

This past still haunts me till this day. I was 13 years old at the time, practically a high-school student, when one day I was walking home from school because my parents couldn't pick me up for they haven't gotten home from work yet and I didn't get to take the school bus because I had to stay longer in school than when I usually do. I wasn't used to walking after school but my house wasn't that far from school, it would approximately only take me 15 minutes to reach the house, but during my walk I felt someone following behind me, though I just thought they were taking the same route as me so I just shrugged it off at the time. I soon realized that they were actually following me back home cause once I looked behind me, they were far closer than what I saw just minutes ago, I began to walk faster, the only thing in my mind was to try and get home safely, they were trailing fast behind me, and before I tried to run, I felt his arm snake around me and pulled me while he covered my mouth with his other hand. He whispered in my ears to just give in and let him do what he wants with me, I tried to fight back but he was much more stronger than me, I hated that I felt he liked that I was trying to fight back and that I was squirming under his hold, so he forced me in a narrow alleyway, and that's where he started to take advantage of me. I wanted to fight back, but I just couldn't move any parts of my body out of shock, in that moment I felt my world shatter and fall apart, I thought that this experience of mine would define me as a person, and everyone would shame me for it. After he was done, he just left me there, my body ached but I did my best to try and get back home again, I stood up, my legs trembling as I tried to put my pants back on. When I got home, I immediately went to my room cause my parents still weren't back from work, I cried my whole heart out on the floor. I didn't talk to anyone about what I experienced because of the fear that they would think it's my fault and they'd shame me for the rest of my life, I have tried to forget about it but everytime I look at myself in the mirror, my mind just goes back to trauma and pain I felt, I feel like I couldn't take it anymore so I tried to unalive myself but a thought came in my mind. That I needed to live for my future, that this experience wouldn't define me as a person, and that this was just something that I should just move on from.

I adopted a beautiful Staffie mix back in July after dreaming of having a dog. It was love at first sight, i couldnt take my eyes off of him. 

Immediately, I regretted my decision. The constant need for attention, and the fact that i cant leave him alone for two seconds or he'll chase our cats or get into somethign he's not supposed to is incredibly drainig. I can handle the three meals a day, I can handle walking him twice a day, but I hadn't really realized how much he'd need my attention. And this is supposedly the easy part. He hasn't had to go to the vet for anything yet or shown any real behavior problems aside from being exciteable and not listening. 

When i turn to the internet for advice, I see all these people who put their pet first and adore spending time and money on them. It's their whole life. It makes me feel terrible for not giving him my whole world, but i dont have a world to give him. I barely have enough energy to keep up with myself. 

I've been an anxious mess for weeks bc i cant keep up with him. He's high energy, and very stubborn. My roomates have been helping me train him and he's improved a lot. He's very sweet but the stress of keeping him happy, healthy, and occupied is just too much for me. I go to school full time for aviation maintainance and I work nights. I usually get home around 9:45, at which point i have to eat, walk my dog, do homework, and sleep. 

I have to keep him kenneled while i'm away from home, which is most of the time. It's only until I finish school and get a job in my field, but even then, I'm not sure I can picture myself taking care of him alone. I'm just not cut out for it. I genuinely think he'd be happier somewhere else, but the thought of going back on my promise to him makes me just as upset and anxious as the thought of keeping him does. When I think about how long we'll be together, I get nauseous and my face starts to tingle. When I think about rehoming him, I think about his sweet face and start to tear up. I just dont know what to do. I dont think i'd be truly happy either way. Adopting him feels like a huge mistake. 

I really dont know what to do.

I want to start of by saying that I’m 16 and I do believe that things will get better once I’m an adult, though I don’t want to grow up. Some of the things that bother me likely happen to everyone during their teens, but maybe I’m just not built to deal with them as good as others are, I’m not sure. Overall I’d say my life is quite alright. This is kind of my lifestory lol maybe so I can think about where I am right now more clearly.

I am an only child. My parents are lovely people, and would never hurt me in any way. I’m very glad to be their child. They’re quite old due to wanting to travel before settling down and having kids. We’re also (mid-upper?) middle class in a 1st world country, with a nice house and we own a pet. So in those categories, I can confidently say I am very luck and grateful. I do decently well in school and have never been punished or such for bad grades.

That being said, my parents are my only close family. One pair of grandparents is still alive, though they keep to themselves a lot, never visit for holidays and barely know anything about me (they’re also sweet people, though). My cousins are all in their 30s so I never connected with them or their children (which are around 5 or so) and my aunts and uncles all have broken marriages, some even moved away to different continents.

I’ve always felt very jealous when my peers talked about their family vacations or Christmas etc. Because I always wished for a sibling or a close cousin. But overall, I accepted it, since I always knew I was quite privileged (and obviously I was told that siblings can be very annoying lol). 

As a young child (idk the actual name for the condition) I had something that when I went to sleep, my throat would feel like its closing up, since I was very small for my age. So i always felt like I was suffocating while trying to sleep. I got tested for asthma like 20 times cause it runs in the family but no, not that. That cost my parents many hours of sleep, since I had to be calmed down and sat on the balcony, plus inhaler etc. Ages 2-8 maybe? It got less but worse with age, since I was more aware of the feeling of suffocating, even if I logically knew I wouldn’t. It genuinely felt like I’d die every time. 

I also nearly drowned in swimming lessons once and still can barely swim. Never getting into water unless my feet touch the ground. 

I always had friends as a little child, but never that close. My best friend Benedict (ages 1-8) was, looking back, probably autistic, but I really loved him. I remember sometimes he’d sit in the corner and refuse to play, but I just accepted it and played on my own. In elementary it got a little harder to maintain the friendship, peers made fun of us (boy-girl friendship!?!?) and I think it really got to him. We both, as kids do, obviously had other friends, too, but none in the same class. 

Since I already had a friend there, my 6 year old self never thought to even attempt to make connections with others, so while the other girls made new friends, formed groups etc. I continued clinging to my best friend. Some of the other friends I made in kindergarden went to different schools, or we just drifted apart. Only 2 remained close (Charlotte and Michel). 

When I was in 2nd or 3rd? grade, my class teacher suffered from a burnout, and I’m quite sure it affected the whole class. She was just staring off into space and forgot about us, I remember having to almost punch her to get her attention to correct my work. Since my school was centred around self-learning, this luckily didn’t affected my grades (though I can’t say the same for other kids). Around that time, I suddenly started being extremely paranoid of dying. There was a wasp nest on our school ground and every time I went close to it, I believed I swallowed a wasp and would suffocate (to the point I started hyperventilating and stuff) But since my class teacher was mentally so exhausted, it wasn’t mentioned to my parents. 

I was invited to a girls bday party (in elementary it was normal to invite the entire class, even if u weren’t close) and it was at a museum for criminology (or so?), atleast we were told about how the police investigates and ALSO poison. As a child, i’d always been under the delusion that poison was green or purple (thx to children’s stories) but there we were told it could also be SEE THROUGH LIKE WATER!!! I freaked the hell out that day. And so, besides my fear of suffocation by wasp, I also started believing my Parents were attempting to poison me! (Important to note here is that I never liked eating much, and many food textures make me gag, so when I stopped eating out of fear, my parents freaked out, since I was already underweight) 

On top of that, I started refusing going to school, and started daydreaming (not sure if that’s the right word, but I actively made these scenarios up) that the walls of my school would swallow me up and take me to a different world. So, my parents pressed me for why I stopped eating and I eventually confessed it’s because I was scared they were trying to poison me. Obviously, this made my parents feel horrible. I think they thought they did something wrong. The solution: I started cooking with them and they tried my food before I ate it. I also refused to eat anything with even a small blemish or discolouration on it. (Miraculous this didn’t fully extent into candy, but my full blown panic attacks convinced my parents that something was wrong, and it wasn’t just for the candy.) 

So I got into therapy and my mom started going to school with me since I refused to go. There she realised my teacher was actually losing it, and we finally got a stable teacher again (4 separate ones, due to pregnancy, illness and so on) I cried in school every day, and my best friend Benedict just couldn’t handle it anymore and stopped speaking with me. Like full on one day we were close, then the next never talked again. So, I had to try and squeeze myself into the already close friendships of my classmates. Some of them felt bad (namely, poison-birthday girl) but I never became that close with any, switching between the few ‘weird‘ girls every few weeks (literally just foreigners who didn’t speak the language well or kids who cried a lot) I managed to become a little popular by being very loud and drawing. 

Therapy worked well and apparently the therapist wasn’t even sure what was wrong with me, since I wasn’t abused or anything. Everything I told her was nice and childish (as it should be) I was just simply oddly paranoid about dying and food (might need to mention i almost choked to death on candy, TWICE) but outside of those fears I was a completely normal child with maybe a little shaky friendships. But no huge bullying stories or drama like that. 

Little anecdote here, I forgot to incorporate properly: My earlier mentioned friend, Michel. We used to role play a kids series, as the mc and the crush, kind of. When we were maybe 5 or a little older, he suddenly became very clingy to me and made us drink a ‘love potion’, after which he started to kiss me and (at first) cuddle. At some point he urged me to take of my clothes and cuddle, which i declined at first but eventually obliged, since I didn’t want to anger my friend. Besides being scared of being pregnant (stupid ik😭) I didn’t mind it much, since I did like him a lot, as a friend! Plus we were kids, so I didn’t think much of it all. Looking back, it’s weird. I’m concerned that he was groomed or something, and I think it did mess me up a little. I still know him today, but he goes drinking all the time and tried his best to get a girlfriend, he’s still as weirdly physically affectionate as back then and tried to touch me during a trip with our sports club recently (sounds worse than it was! Not a big deal, idk how to state it in a more tame manner!) he’s a friendly and outgoing person who’d never hurt anyone on purpose. As children do, I attempted to recreate this behaviour on the few friends I had. Either through actual physical closeness (sorry to anyone who was affected by this) or through playing with dolls etc. One of my friends, Emilia, who I know had a rather rough home life, was the only one to accept this, and we used to recreate such activities with horse figures. Not proud of that! Sorry Emilia! But i feel many kids did this, atleast I have some friends now, who admit it. 

My friend charlotte went to a different elementary school, and we kept in contact through letters. However, after the bad part of my little mental break was over, I for some reason lost all interest in replying. I did like her and liked playing with her, but writing a letter back just felt like such a chore, that I refused to do it, even when my mom tried to force me. So we completely lost contact. This was the first time that I was the person to end a friendship and it felt a lot better. It just didn’t matter to me, I kind of forget about her immediately.

So end of elementary school chapter! I’d like to add here, that I would’ve always described myself as outgoing and curious, but I don’t now. My parents still think so, however. 

I’m on a good school, and my class is nice, there’s no bullying and we don’t have any truly annoying kids in the class. In 5th grade I was a bit mad cause two of my friends from elementary got into a different class together, without me. Now I think that was a good thing. I kind of tried to connect with the new people in class, but I didn’t think any of them to be very interesting (most of them kinda knew each other already). I ended up kind of befriending a few and finding one girl that didn’t know anyone else there, S. She was a foreigner so sometimes it was hard to communicate, but we both played roblox so we got along. Even started a small yt channel lol. 

Then covid hit, and we had online classes I didn’t study anymore and never raised my hand (well before i didn’t either) and my grades dropped, not critically, but it was kind of humiliating. I completely stopped talking to anyone except S.. I also kind of reconnected with the poison birthday girl, who went to the same school. Together we made an online friend from a different country, one year older than us, who was autistic (undiagnosed till like 13) and suicidal. We tried our best to cheer him up, hour long discord calls etc. My english was a lot better than poison bday girl (M.), so i connected a lot better than she did. I also kind of fell down the sexist and moderately racist alpha-male rabbit hole, that formed during 2020-2022, instead of the whole dream, anime and lgbtq stuff. Not proud of that one, but I can say I’ve never agreed with racist or homophobic views EVER! I simply had unrestricted internet access for the first time in my short life. 

E., the kid we met online eventually formed a crush on me, and then on M., since we were his only friends. I don’t wanna give any details on his or M.’s lives, but they both had it a lot rougher than me, so I was basically giving free therapy for both of them. When school resumed normally, my friend S. failed the grade and changed schools, we stopped talking. By then, M. was the closest friend I ever had, we did everything together and I never got bored talking to her, even though we kind of hated each other in elementary for a short while. I told her everything and so did she. We got so close even, that it eventually got uncomfortable for me. I didn’t know how to express my gratitude and love for M.! 

Since I lost many friends to others during elementary, I got very jealous and dismissive every time she talked about her friends from class, and I often talked down her achievements so she wouldn’t think herself too good for me.  She did the same to me, so it was kind of even? Overall we were a pretty good duo, 10 hour calls, drawing together, talking to E. together and trying to help him etc. 

At some point E. got to a very bad place mentally, and I focused my attention a lot more on him than on M.. All my messages to her were stuff like ‘Hey, let’s call E., see how he’s doing..’ ‘Can you ask E….’ and so on. I also used to hit her for some reason, maybe because she didn’t like hugging etc and I didn’t know what else to do. What i’m trying to say: M. is the closest friend i’ve ever had and I genuinely have never felt more at ease around a person. 

Our friendship lasted less than a year. From spring 2021 to oktober 2021. We went on vacation together, her with me and my parents. It was nice, we had a lot of fun. When we went back to school after autumn break, she suddenly ignored me, no messages, wouldn’t reply to E. either, and didn’t come to me during lunch break. I was freaking out, and spam messaged + called her a lot. She eventually told me she wanted a break from the friendship. I was mentally already not doing too well, but at this point I cut myself a few times and entertained suicidal thoughts for a long while. I felt really ashamed because I know my life isn’t bad in any way, I’m just fragile. I never told this to anyone, because it feels like I have no reason to have thoughts like that.

E. didn’t care that much, since he liked me more (mainly due to language barrier with M.). I continued to help him through mental struggles, so much so that I eventually agreed to be his girlfriend, so he wouldn’t kill himself. In school, I made friends with a girl who just moved to our country and entered our class. I attempted to behave like I did in my friendship with M. (which obviously wasn’t all good) and my new friend EF. pulled away, rightfully so. So I was completely on my own for a few months.

EF. is very outgoing and made friends  with practically everyone, so I, by extension, was also included in the 10 girl group that formed in my class. It took me probably 3 years to get over M. but the new group definitely helped me, so for a while all was well. 

I always thought myself to be EF’s. best friend, but I wasn’t actually that close with her. I realised that she had no interests in common with me, nor did anyone extroverted in the group. After the fallout with M. I kind of became introverted, because I didn’t know how to interact with more ‘distant’ friends than her. I was too stubborn to realise that the way i treated her, or the humour we used, wouldn’t be accepted by most, unless very close, which obviously I wasn’t with anyone. 

But they were nice enough, and so I, since I shared 0 interests, just turned to making jokes and listening to others. Being kinda weird and funny became my new image and I didn’t mind it. I genuinely believed I was good friends with them, even though we never texted or even met up (I refused to meet them because I was always so exhausted after school, still am) . I was invited to birthdays and some other meet ups. Birthdays were always nice, because typically they include activities (laser tag etc). 

The very few times I went out with the entire group, I kind of silently walked along, since most of them were friends since 5th grade, I couldn’t really chime in that well. The exception was EF, since she’d moved here, but she’s EXTREMELY extroverted and can talk to practically everyone at any time. I slowly regained my confidence and social skills. Throughout all this I remained in contact with E. 

OK now in the present! Horray! (kinda)

2024 I started feeling more and more left out of the group. They didn’t laugh at my old jokes anymore, and started caring a lot more about boys and alcohol (reasonable, I don’t drink but i do see the appeal). I didn’t immediately catch the shift, and started withdrawing from them. Also important to note, I barely have any social media, which kind of removes the top thing they talk about. EF was best friends with almost everyone except me, it seemed, though she would’ve said that I am her best friend too. 

So, new seating plan in class, I get sat next to one of the two very quiet friends in the group (Two asian girls, A. and K. who live in the same house and have been friends since kindergarden). A. was very quiet and hesitant at first, and so was I, but eventually the awkward silence cringed me out so bad that I just started talking about whatever. I think she was pretty weirded out at first. I didn’t think i’d have much of a chance since the two of them were so close, but surprisingly A. seemed to enjoy sitting with me. 

I was very very happy!!! The two of them also draw, so I finally had atleast one of my interests acknowledged. Unfortunately, neither of them ever opened up to me, and I was always the only one talking. I’ve asked both of them about it and they simply don’t know what to say, which I totally get, since I used to be in that position. But it’s just so exhausting dude, I talk the ENTIRE time. They barely reply, no long conversations, no laughing at jokes unless VERY, VERY funny. A. also cuts themselves and i don’t know what to do, if i should talk to her about it. I’ve asked K. and she said she’s seen it but has no details either, nor does she seem to care. A. had quite peculiar interests (the beetles😭) and I try to learn about it, but I just have 0 care for it.  

Both of them are quite lonely, and like I said I try my best to get closer to them and just be there, be kind. But they just won’t reciprocate. They do view me as their closest friend, but I get NOTHING back. Apparently that was also their issue with the whole group, no one there likes them, they think A. & K. are weird and hard to talk to. And I guess they are, a little. And the worst part is, since they know each other, they can obviously talk to each other a lot more than I can with them. It’s really frustrating. It’s not like I’m seeing this as a challenge of cracking their walls and stuff, I just have no one else except E. and sometimes EF.. 

Recently I’ve ran out of stuff to say. They know tons about me, and I always ask them stuff back obviously, but get one word answers. I feel like I barely know them. Most of what we talk about is school related or just momentary jokes. Maybe art or music sometimes. I do like them a lot, and I know they like me too. But we just don’t click well. And it’s just so draining that i’ve even started taking naps after school. 

Most recent news are: EF had a fallout with the group over a bad birthday present and has come back to me instead. I was kind of pissed off at first, but she’s the same as always and there’s a bit of comfort in having her back as my friend. She cares about many things that i couldn’t care less about (boys and drinking, as mentioned previously). Like yes, I do have crushes, but EF had over 3 boyfriends already, one of them being an adult. She’s got many problems, and I try my best to support her. We do all the school projects together etc, but all she ever talks about is parties, mental health and her boyfriends/new ‘crushes’ which change every few days. Since she has no friends in class anymore, she completely depends on me, which is pulling me away from A. and K. since EF isn’t a big fan of them (no hate, just completely different people). 

In turn, the little contact I had with the group (sitting by them while they talk) is gone and I barely interact with them anymore. Worst part is none of them care. When I sit next to them we do exchange a few words, but we’re obviously not friends anymore. A habit i desperately want to break is, that whenever i don’t know what to say anymore I just hold people’s hands or hug them, or whatnot. It’s kind of weird, I fear! But otherwise i genuinely feel disconnected from them, well maybe I am in a way. 

I’ve been removed from the majority of group chats which i never even talked in and am now basically on my on balancing my friendships with EF A. and K.. I’ve never been more exhausted, my countries versions of the gcses are coming and I can’t get myself to focus and study. I’m on my phone all the time, I never go out except for my hobbies (which feel draining and hard to attend). I think I look somewhat ugly (well mainly I look incredibly exhausted). My three friends are doing worse than I and I’ve lost all interest in doing stuff I used to like. Im still together with E. and it’s genuinely weighing me down. I’ve never had much interest, but we were very close, talked about everything. But it’s the same as with A. and K., I just never get anything back. Yes, he does ask how i’m doing and stuff, but when i actually tell him about it, i get nothing. I just feel embarrassed and he says oh ok! Like no it’s not ok dude. 

I know they all care about me and I’m glad to have them at all but sometimes it just feels like i’m babysitting or trying to trick them into caring about me. Since we have no solid interactions I only ever feel as close to them as I did the last time we talked since there’s nothing to built on. For EF and E it’s a little different, but there’s still barely any input from them into our relationship. 

I know this all might sound a little selfish and stuff but I promise I’m more than ok with caring for people without much in return. It’s just that I have absolutely no one to really rely on. Sure, I can tell them all how I feel, but i just end up feeling humiliated because I don’t get a solid response just an Ah Ok so that’s how it is.

And another thing is that I have interests that they don’t, and have no one to talk to about them, who would want to listen. Since they don’t. I’ve even gotten my mom into series I like, but I think she’s starting to grow a bit tired of it. I know this all sounds so selfish but I really just wish I had a best friend like M. again, who actually took interest in my interests and I in theirs as well as problems and worries. 

E. makes me feel trapped by now, he’s got a whole future planned out that I don’t want to be a part of. I like him in a way, but I just want my freedom. He’s in a whole different country and chances are we’ll never even meet, it feels like i’m wasting my time. But I don’t know how to fix this, I can’t just break up cause he’ll definitely take it deeply personal. And the worst part is I do wanna go out and party like my (ex) friends did, I really do. But I have no one to go with and I’m terrible at making new friends. I’m awkward around people who I don’t know. All the girls from my class including EF go to parties and such with their friends. I’ve went to one (when EF was still with the old group) and just stood in the corner of a cold garden for two hours while my ‘friends’ talked among themselves. Not very fun! 

I genuinely feel like i’m wasting my youth, I wish I could do everything but I know I can’t. I love this world and all, I’m not suicidal anymore. I want to learn every language visit every country meet many people and be good at all my hobbies. But I don’t have time I procrastinate, I’m too scared to do stuff on my own, nor would my parents let me, but I don’t have anyone to drag along. I need to study for my exams but I can’t I just can’t get myself to do it. I sit in my room all day every single day and do NOTHING!!! I lie to my parents and say oh I drew today, I read today! I didn’t. I didn’t do anything! I’ve talked to my mom about all of this, she thinks I’m lazy and says it’ll all get better. I’ve told her I literally can’t get myself to do anything, being in school exhausts me because of my friends, I sometimes skip school pretend to be sick because I just don’t have the strength to go. I don’t even celebrate my birthday anymore, because having my friends there would exhaust me. Even if it’s nice, I don’t want to feel so drained after every little thing. I always think I should take a walk or drive somewhere but I’m too scared to talk to the bus driver to buy a ticket and I’m too tired to walk. I feel so nostalgic for my childhood and I’d much rather go back than move forward, I never want to lose these memories even if I don’t like them. i don’t want to grow up and I freak out whenever I remember I’m still so young and have so much time. Unfortunately the whole political scene right now isn’t helping. I really wish I could just be 7 again. When my cat was young and I still liked school loved my birthday and was never tired. I have no wishes or ambitions, I don’t know what to do with my life. I’d love to move away but I’d forever miss my house and my city. I dread the day that I graduate. I don’t wanna be working all day. I just hope i’ll find people and it’ll all be nicer than I imagine. I feel like i’ve missed out on so much already and it’ll only get worse.

She then goes upstairs without saying anything, then I thought I heard crying, so I turn to my boyfriend and I go, “I think she’s crying but I don’t know.” He goes after her to talk to her and then HE SCOLDS me and says that she told him it feels like me and my mom gang up on her. :/ So now I gotta shut up completely. I'm Ashley, and I’m 27 years old. I’ve been dealing with depression since I was 17. Most days, I stay at home because it makes me feel safe. I do different activities based on how I feel, like listening to music, eating, sleeping, watching TV, journaling, and coloring. Starting conversations is really hard for me; I often struggle to think of what to say and feel very shy about messaging people first. I understand why some people might choose to leave, and I worry a lot about reaching out because I’m scared of rejection or being ignored. Sometimes I think nobody would really want to talk to me. Being in public, especially in crowds, is tough for me, which makes asking for help difficult. I don’t like making phone calls and prefer texting or emailing because I’m scared of being judged or misunderstood. I feel too nervous to talk on the phone. If I had friends to video call, I’d probably just stay quiet the entire time because I feel anxious and don’t know how to keep the conversation going. I know it’s hard for me to share all of this, but my worries often lead me to feel sad and sometimes angry. I’m currently in a relationship with my boyfriend, who can be controlling. He tells me what to say in messages and doesn’t give me much personal space; he can be super clingy at times, but I understand because I can be the same way too. If I don’t reply right away, he deletes his messages or sends a lot of them again until I reply, which adds to my stress. Even though he helps me with daily tasks I struggle with, like cooking, hygiene, and laundry, talking on the phone is hard for me, and I love him for being there when others have left me, but it still feels complicated. He has mentioned that he has a bit of autism that he calls borderline autism, and while I support him, it can be hard for me to be alone. I’d rather be with someone who stays. I know I shouldn’t think that everyone is the same, but after being hurt many times, I can’t help but feel this way. My stepdad adds to my stress too; he often accuses me of things that aren’t true, judges my music taste, and invades my privacy by coming into my room when I’m not there. He even turns off the extension cord where my devices are plugged in, or sometimes turns off the whole fuse box just because he doesn’t like my music. One time, when I was playing my favorite band on TV, he called it witchcraft or devil music when music is something that helps me through a lot, so I listen to it on my laptop instead. I really wish my mom would stop drinking, but she refuses to get help. I know she won’t leave my stepdad because of her money problems since she has so many bills, so I feel like it’s best for me to find a way out of my situation, even if that means moving back in with my boyfriend. I don’t want to feel pressured to be independent or to get a job because that feels overwhelming. I don’t have to do anything I don't want to, and I am not comfortable with. I worry that my anger might cause me to lash out at times, which is why I don’t have a job; it would be too hard to manage that with my anger. I get a monthly check, and I’m scared that if I work, it might get cut, which makes me more anxious. I prefer saving my money because it feels easier and less stressful. I often think about moving back to my boyfriend, away from Georgia, because it might help ease my worries about being alone and having someone there, even with his controlling behavior. I love that he holds me when I cry, and I realize that I might not be making complete sense, but I just want to be in a relationship. I love him so much, and I fear that everyone will leave me. I need someone who means what they say and won’t lie or leave me. He is okay with me being dependent, and he takes care of me, which makes me feel safe. I refuse to be single because it seems like I will never find anybody else like him who can deal with me being very dependent. He has been there for me through so much, and I also hate doing things by myself because I get nervous and anxious, worrying about everything that could happen. But with him, I don’t have to worry about those things. I’ve been with him for 8 years, and even though he can be controlling, he is very loyal and has done everything to keep me safe. He comforts me when I feel alone and sad. He will never give attention to other women, and he made it clear to me that he only wants me. I have always had trouble making friends because starting conversations is hard for me. I often feel shy about messaging first, and at the same time, I don’t reach out because I am afraid of rejection and being ignored. I understand why people leave because I struggle with conversations, especially starting them. I just really miss having someone like him who comforts me when I cry. I wouldn't have to go through anything alone if I were still living with him, despite everything. I have become very clingy because my fear of rejection has led to anger over time. It is hard to control my feelings because every little thing makes me angry, and then I want to explode. It's tough not to feel angry because I’ve been hurt before, and it’s hard to be nice to people who seem to ignore me. When I think about going back to him, I won’t have to worry about being alone or feel judged for having a learning disability. I truly love him so much; he makes me happy despite his controlling behavior. I would rather deal with this than be alone with people who will leave, ignore me, or hurt me. I just needed to get everything off my chest and share what I am going through. I have spent so many holidays, occasions, and everything with him, but when I am in Georgia, I just feel very alone, isolated, or like nobody wants to hang out, and also the reason I don't reach out to other people is that I know they have their own lives, kids, and jobs, which I can understand, but it is the same as in person with making conversations. I do feel like sometimes I don't feel understood or that nobody cares because of the things that happen, but I also hate to tell people my problems or feel like a burden because I know people go through their own problems too, so I end up keeping things bottled up inside and choose to suffer or have the feeling like I will be laughed at, bullied, or judged for how I feel, my problems, or anything. I do find joy in doing things, but sometimes I just lose interest and don’t want to do anything.

When I was 15, two years ago, I got into my first relationship, even if it later on turned out to be a toxic one. 
My ex and I had been introduced by his best friend, who then became one of my best friends and helped me when I broke up with him and we distanced ourselves from him. 
I didn't really love him, but I was desperate for love and desperately tried to please him every way I could. 
When we first started dating, he told me that his best friend had, in the past, ghosted him "out of the blue" or "without a reason". He never told me what had happened prior to that, but I then learned that he had most probably omitted his faultiness in what happened and the fact that his best friend, when she ghosted him, was in a really dark place. 
He would try to make himself appear as the victim in every situation, and I let him, even contributing to it. In the meantime, I got closer to his best friend and she joined my friend group. None of my friends know all about what actually happened while I was with him, but still helped me when they saw the massive red flags. I stayed with him for a year and something more, but I never told his former best friend the truth about what he thought of her and about what had happened. I've now been best friends with her for almost two years, but she still doesn't know. My ex and her stopped talking after I broke up with him, but she told me various times that she would like to talk with him and ask him what happened and why he cut off their friendship. I've never been more scared of losing her and I know that, if it'll happen, it'll only be my fault.

It was that tuesday, where my friends were shipping me nonstop. I hated being shipped. It was annoying, ruined conversations, and I never liked anyone in the first place. I decided that tuesday I needed to put that shipping to a stop.

Tuesday night I dmd my friend saying "hey.... i'm dating btw so please don't ship me" . Next day they stopped. I thought I had made the perfect plan and that everyone would stop and my life would be normal again. The next day I was walking with my friend and she asked me what he looked like. I didn't have any name, or idea of what my "boyfriend" looked like. I made up some stuff, saying they were the same race as me, etc etc. Turns out we didn't realize but my friend was walking behind us the whole conversation, but they promissed to keep my boyfriend a secret.

One week later half of my friend group found out. They asked "whats his name" "does he have social media" "whats his number I need to make sure hes good for you" and generic questions that sounded reasonable. What these friends did not know is that I was dating nobody, and this all was a lie. Them starting to believe I was lying I did what any normal teen would have done and created a account on a social media for him. Whenever my friends asked "What does he look like?" "i don't believe he is real!", i would just give them the username of a unreal person.

This kept on going on for one whole month. Accounts after accounts piled up and I became two people, a woman during the day, and her boyfriend during the night. I made excuses like "We made a bet to never take pictures of eachother" for why I don't have a photo. I even went as far as taking photos of a image found on google when sending a snap. I felt lonely, not knowing what to do. I did the reasonable thing, I "broke up" with this boyfriend. my friends were shocked, but still shipped me with my ex. I felt off and weird, knowing stuff.

Recently this not so real guy got added to a discord server. I played the role of him again. I thought I had gotten rid of him, but I hadn't. A week later I got added to a groupchat on my boyfriends account, they did not know it was me. One person on this groupchat started talking about me and how "annoying" and "stupid" i am. I didn't know what to say. Next thing you know one of the people I considered my friends said "she's not even my friend anyway". I figured this is the price I had to pay for lying, and that it's all because I never told the truth.

A personality shapped for this boyfriend, and obssessed and good looking guy who lives far away in a different time zone. He was homeschooled (so i didn't have to state the school) and was a year older then me. more people started to get added to this groupchat, and the shipping only got worse. Worse then it was before I had made this guy. It was weird for me, as for I felt lonley, and isolated. My friends were more focused on other guys then their own friends, and I didn't have a guy to look up to. During this time I considered myself bi, but as my friends started to rush in and talk about their experiences of love, I realized that maybe i was aro. I started questioning not only myself but my understanding of truth.

This fake person still exists and I am a full time two life liver. I figure it's to late and if I confess this person is fake my friends won't ever trust me again and my life is ruined. I have been slowly trying to get rid of my double life but it's not working. its still a real person in the people i know and love minds. This whole thing had taught me that sometimes the truth hurts, and had totally moved my grades down in school. I havn't had a dream since then. And I cannot tell what is a friend.

Let me know if you have any opinions.

Context, I had this friend called 'E'. I had briefly met E before becoming actual friends with her and she seemed really nice. When we became friends, I thought I had met someone who really really REALLY understood me, or at least close to that. A bff I had ―and still have― was more focused on another friend so I focused on E. I'll be telling some incidents that led me into the feelings I will explain in the conclusion: The first big argument I had with her happened because she started to untie my shoelaces, I didn't want her to, I hit her on her head. She got mad I hit her and stopped talking to me for 4 days. On the 4th day, I had done something with my hair that really left me mad. I was venting to this other friend that I was sad because of my hair and E popped out of nowhere to ask if I was sad because of her silence. 'Bitchily', won't deny, I told her off and that I wasn't sad 'cause of her ― she got even madder. On the 5th day, I went ahead, apologized for what I had done and things got solved, but not before her telling me she wanted to beat me, and that she could've, if she didn't 'love me so much'. Our next argument was over the fact that I texted her if she wanted to chat, she said no, that she was tired coming out of training. I posted in a close friends story a meme that related to her and to her relationship with her boyfriend. It was a harmless joke, I had done it a thousand times and thought she wouldn't get mad. Days after, she treats me coldly over chat but normal irl. I asked why and she said she had planned on 'not talking to me' but she answered something I said and then couldn't just stop talking ― do you see how ridiculous that is? From these two and other minor incidents where she would never try to talk things out and instead just shut up, I began recognizing a pattern. The thing that tipped me over was how she had told me she wanted to be mature, that it was her biggest dream to achieve maturity, but didn't seem to be working on it. She told me this after I told her how I had been going through really hard times mentally and had a conversation over that. This year, I've been making progress in recovering mentally but... where is her growth?; She gets mad at others for doing or saying the same things she does or says, she told me in my face that I do not make art, would never be an artist, and that I'd die unrecognized ―art is of the most important things if not the in my life and I would dedicate eternity to it―, she keeps on not talking things out when she's mad, has never apologized a single time while I have several, where is the supposed growth? At a party our friend group was invited to, I pulled her over and called out her behavior, how I appreciated our friendship but her behavior was getting to me. All she did was say that I had done things too ―I apologized over that immediately and at the moment―, that she was that way  because she hadn't begun beginning her maturity process, and that it was something taken from her family. No apology, no accountability, no nothing. What is that bullshit? We immediately grew apart. And I'm in despair over all this. Because I thought we may have *the* friendship. The we-know-each-other-from-years-back friends. I thought she loved me in the way I did ― she didn't. One day, she asked me that if she dropped dead, what would I do. I told her I'd shriek and mourn her a lot, I wouldn't stop thinking about her ― she said "all that for someone you met 7, 8 months ago?". I should've known then, I should've made the pieces up in my mind what I was to her, but I couldn't bring myself to and now she's dead ―metaphorically― to me really and I backed up all I said ― I can't stop thinking about her. I shriek and mourn what we were and, in an alternative reality, could've been every time I hear her name.

You think you see everything, don't you?

You see a clone, a simple being, born to follow your miniscule footprints.
You see a perfect porcelain doll, made to sit on a shelf and look pretty.
You see a top-of-her-class student, friend to all and gifted at every task she lays her hands upon.
You see through fogged glasses, not bothering to wipe them clean.
You see you.
You is all you see.

But where am i?

Can you see me?

What do i see?

I see her own human.
She's scared.

Why?

She doesn't know.

But i know.


She's scared of you.

She's scared of telling you anything, things simple as her music taste because it's not yours.
She's scared of you ruining her one simple dream in life, because it's not yours.
She's scared of you finding out she doesn't fit in her own skin, torn between the two sides of the war of human kind.
She's scared of sharing her beautiful world she created over the years with you, because you'll crush it to pieces.
She's scared of you learning about the friends she made on her second digital world, because she's not a photo-copied clone like everyone else in out stupid small town.
She's scared of dressing the way she wants because it's not exactly like you.
She's scared of you. 
She's scared.

Why did you do this? Why treat her like another species? It didn't have to be like this.

I see her friend joking around with and showing her artwork to her mom.

Why can't she do that?

I see her friend wearing her own style to school.

Why can't she do that?

Because she's trapped in you.
You need to let her out so she can be with me.
I am her, she is split.

I actually decided to do it when I was in math class, after lunch, so it wasn’t very planned.  I was too overwhelmed, I felt depressed.  I was too tired to do the exercises properly.   So much for skipping a grade, eh?  The worse is that I have everything under control, and better grades already than most of the class.

The idea that I was going to die was actually so comforting.  
When my mother yelled at me because I used the microwave too much and that it would break, well I thought I would never use it again, so it won’t break and won’t cost anything to my parents.  
When I forgot to unplug the hair dryer and got yelled at again too, i thought that i will never have to deal with my mother’s shit about that again.  
When I read my school book I thought that I would never have to do more work on it.
I mean, pretty cool right?  Im not encouraging suicide by the way, it is not a good thing.  Im just expressing what I felt.  
I didn’t really care about the good things that make me want to live.  I didn’t really think about my love, the ones I’m trying to save and my friends.  
God, now I can’t save people from suicide anymore.  I literally tried it.  I would be such a hypocrite for that right?

My boyfriend and I are homeless, crashing on a couple's back porch, and we just got a van. Things are trending upwards as far as our luck and security living van life, but I'm nervous. I think I can handle this...it's just that I don't have any other solid supports in my life. My boyfriend really feels like all I have. Our families hate us, so we don't have them to lean on - they have abandoned us. Everyone else either left my life after I became homeless or became wildly dismissive and indifferent to me after I became homeless. My boyfriend has also experienced this, and we've both also experienced being driven out of people's homes on multiple occasions. This shit is hard. We're disabled. We're sick and in pain. Doctors are abusive. We know how to care for ourselves, but these awful people whose back porch we're in are completely fucked up child abusers and fear mongerers, which drains us! We can't be nearly as diligent about our survival if people get in our way this much. I've defended the children, and I would do it again. Before I did that, the parents were often shouting. They might still be doing that, but they seem to be either containing it by concealing it behind closed doors in the house, or perhaps dishing it all the way out when they visit their other property and bring the kids. They've gotten sneakier, but they have also gotten quite discouraged because I stepped in. I plan to keep contact with the oldest, because she and I have always been tight. I know mom from the internet, where we met many years ago. She is not the same person I once knew at all. She is off the rails entirely. Abt 3 years ago, I transferred schools. The first month was fine, I didn't really have any friends, but that was okay with me because I've always been shy and introverted. But the second month is when things took a turn for the worse. This really popular girl, who I never really paid any attention to, started picking on me for no reason. It's not that serious at first because she's just giving me looks and sneering subtle jabs at me... until she starts calling me slurs, pushing me and hitting me, fat-shaming me, and telling her inner circle of friends or whatever to bully me as well. It reached a climax when she and some of her friends ganged up on me and, uh, beat me. I'm a boy (kind of short for my grade, I'm 5'4, so they were able to get an advantage on me), however, so no one really believed me. Even when I showed the teachers the scratches, cuts, bruises, etc., all they did was email her parents. :/ At this point, I'm depressed (still am) and started not eating because her comments about my weight got to me (still do). I can't tell my parents because they have their own issues with themselves, each other, and at their jobs (we're not in a financially stable position, so I can't really change schools easily). About 5 months in(i think) and I'm at my lowest mentally and sometimes even physically as the popular girl would hit me with a variety of items. That's when he entered my life, he was also new and had moved from California, at first he would sit next to me at lunch and just silently eat next to me, then he would ask to partner up with me in school projects, and eventually we became friends. He would share his lunch with me if I forgot to pack mine or couldn't afford any school lunch, he let me come over to his house and tutor me for hours on his own time, always included (at first) me even when he gained new friends, and we had special nicknames for eachother that only we could use. He also defended me whenever the popular girl tried to bully me and her bullying became much less frequent. I love this guy and was scared to admit this to him because I'm also a guy and wasn't sure if he felt the same. This all changed the second year i think? he started becoming more distant, which was unnoticeable at first but then I spotted him with the popular girl. I felt betrayed because they were sitting next to eachother, at a secluded table, laughing and eating as if he hadn't witnessed her call me terrible names, punch me, and text me awful things. I was so freaking confused and confronted him about it. He shrugged it off and they became closer, and closer, and closer. Until, you guessed it, they announced they were dating. It got worst bc when she picked back up bullying me(sometimes i wonder if its even worse now) he's present for most of it and either stays silent or laughs/chuckles. I don't know what I did wrong. This is pretty much my everyday life now and I hate going back to school everyday. He won't even look at me without showing me the middle finger and laughing at me. I sit alone now and cry pretty much everyday bc I love him and I can't figure out what the fuck I did wrong. I've stopped eating again(sometimes for days at a time), I'm going comatose for most of the day, and my grades are dropping and I'm constantly thinking about him. I just want him back.
I should have bought a gun. None of this would have happened to me. Why didn't I kill myself years ago.

I’ve been in disbelief since the election in the United States. I struggle every day with motivation, self care, intimacy, I can’t find a reason to keep going. I can’t reasonably see a future for myself after January 20th. 
I was so sure the other candidate was going to win. I was scared of the man winning but I was told to keep the faith and keep the hope. 
And I did. 
I planned for college, I was planning with my boyfriend to have children. I was going to have a life. A full life of freedom and happiness. I wanted to be more than a woman. More than a girl. More than a future mother. I wanted to be
Me. 
 But since the election. 
Since that day. 
I have walked around in a haze. I stare off into the distance for hours at a time. I think of the future and my whole body seizes and I freeze.
I go to work and pretend I’m fine. I come home and look at my boyfriend and wonder if he could’ve voted would he have voted for that man. 
I look in the eyes of my family. Knowingly. I know what they casted. 
I know whatever decision and bargain they made with god, I was the sacrifice. My sisters were sacrifices. Their holy scripture was a  sacrifice. And no one is coming to save us. 
No one cares about us. 
That man is the devil. 
And I don’t want to live in a world where people openly wear that mark on their heads. 
I don’t want to live. 
But I’m afraid of dying. 
So I exist in limbo. 
Half awake. Half dreaming.
 Slowly rotting.
