I can’t handle this shit any more. I really don’t want to hate my mom, I really don’t. But it’s hard not to. Every time I talk to her I somehow turn into my worst version possible, and every time I wish I could just put distance between us I know deep down I never could. She trusts no one except maybe my dad, and I know she’d never trust me. Her fuckass persona of “strong Russian woman” pisses me off because it’s like my mom is a complete stranger to me, I have no idea who she is and how to live with her.

Supposedly as a kid I started suddenly hating physical contact. I don’t know why, and don’t have an explanation now either. What I do know is that this is how the distance was created, and it’s irreversible now. I wish the plan to become numb to her constant shit would be easy, something I could achieve, but I still deep down crave her approval and love. She claims that she and my dad did everything for me, and yet I treat them like trash. My angry outbursts aren’t something I can control, I’ve tried and they’ve caused innumerable issues in my life for me with relationships but I actually just can’t effectively control them. My mom hasn’t apologized to anyone, including me, in years even if it’s her fault. She never will, as that’s a weakness to her I guess. Being her daughter makes me want to discover the magic properties of drugs and alcohol and suicide, how they’d place me away from all this. I wouldn’t, as that’s an even worse situation to live in, but by god I want to get out of this mess. I can’t communicate with her, it’s like pulling nails with rusty weak pliers and according to her, I only talk to her when necessary. 

Hard not to when I have nothing to talk about with her. Her interests are either unknown to me, or they’re not in any way similar to mine. Hell, I don’t think she even has hobbies. Her life is the exact opposite of what I want to live as in life, this miserable, old woman who is so hard to love. Every day, she sticks her nose into a computer, loudly watching the millionth movie about war and love, and in her hands is her phone with yet another pimple extraction video. She pays more attention, cares more for those things than me. Of course, it’s not to say she’s never done anything for me, that’s entirely untrue. I have a pilot license because she helped pay for it, I have many other achievements because of her, and I am grateful for these kinds of opportunities and help that very few people could even have. But it’s like our relationship is entirely transactional, and I hate it. 

I wish there was some magical cure for this or a simple explanation, but it’s a mess. I hate that the root seems to be my mind, and how I can’t control my responses. It’s just that so much of what she does is so rage-inducing to me that I’m overflowing with hate at this point. I can’t see a pimple video or hear someone talk about it because of her, how it remind me of her addiction with it. I hate Russian pop music because that’s what she listens to, and anything good about it that I might’ve otherwise enjoyed is lost. I hate family trips because we always find a way to get into the billionth argument. And obviously she’s too good at arguing, with her steel wall of a persona and ability to completely control her voice while I turn into a crying and trembling mess as soon as I try and explain myself. I hate my weakness, and I hate that I even get into these arguments. At this point, I can’t think of anything I love with my whole heart about my mom. When I think of her all I can think of are all the things about her that piss me off, and then I think about the more important arguments we’ve had. 

I asked her if she sees me as a blank spot, and she said that if anything, it’s me who views her and my dad as blank spaces. It’s false, but there’s no way to convince her otherwise at this point, and if there were, I wouldn’t believe it either since she’s an expert at giving me nothing to work with in arguments. I doubt myself at the earliest chance, and it spirals downhill. I’m lucky she’s never weaponized her full emotionally dead heart and mind against me because k think I would’ve done something entirely different from just typing my rage and sadness into the notes app. I want to curse so much, come up with a slur specifically for people like her and get a one up on her, see her crumble like I do, and walk away. Obviously if that chance were to even happen, walking away would mean the end of it all. Comforting her would fail. Or she’s just find a way to twist it to her benefit. I’m always the bad guy, and while I can see how my dad always blames her even if it’s actually his fault, I guess she has the same mindset for me. I can’t control my reactions. My intention was never to hurt, it wasn’t even to offend. I respond angrily to the notion, the idea of what she says, but every damn time it just looks like I’m angry at her specifically. 

Even if I were to suddenly stop, gain perfect control over myself, find a way to talk to my mom in a friendly manner about hobbies and shit it would be too late, and nothing can fix this. It’s like I’m already grieving her death in this emotional loss. Where is my mom? Where is the person that many other friends turn ti for comfort or advice or treat like a best friend, because this red haired woman is a stranger to me. I have no idea who she is, and I can never open up to her without living in fear later that she’d utilize it. She’s taught me to trust no one, and I guess in her head that includes me, all because somewhere along the way little me suddenly hated physical touch. 

This all probably sounds maybe like autism or some other disorder, and I refuse to accept it. There has to be a way to control this, so that I never become like this with anyone else in life. I can never love someone or date anyone or god forbid marry someone out of fear of acting like this and becoming just like her. I have infinite hate for a lifestyle like hers, and I’d probably rather off myself than live like that. Throw it all to the wind, becoming this numb to another person’s feelings must be no different from real death at this point, just a cold machine in a meat suit that has long since forsaken her only other child. She makes me sick with her behavior. I have no control and yet I crave it, and a simple pill to cure an invisible disease to my madness would honestly just make me dig this hole willingly and deeper.

Once, I was really upset about something. I can’t remember what it is, maybe college or school. It was evening, and I walked to her room in tears, looking for comfort or a hug or anything mildly positive. Instead I received no acknowledgement from her, she kept watching her movie and pimples, never tearing her eyes off the screen. She told me “not right now” and that she “hates the sound of crying”. How can I possibly ever disclose my heart to her? She’s not blind, no. She’s ignoring it, and it’s justified to her. I just want a mom that’s not blind to me. My head is loud, and my emotional existence is a mess, and if only there was a way to sort it all out. There’s probably not, and a doctor would listen to this, call me a bratty teenager, how all teens get over this, how this is normal between mothers and daughters. How on gods green godforsaken earth is this normal? If I go to community college for a year and spend one more year here, I don’t know what will become of me. I might explode, I might have an argument of cosmic proportions with her over something, and I will honestly just need a way to leave home. It feels cold in her company. 

I can guiltily admit that when I went to camp as a counselor, or whenever she and my dad would leave for a few days for a vacation (rarely), I’d think five times before calling. I don’t get homesick, and I don’t end up craving to talk to her, because I think somewhere deep down I’ve accepted that she will never be a companion to me, and I have nothing I feel comfortable in discipline to her, as she is judgmental and I can’t handle that. When I was home alone for a few days at a time, I’d spend the days in silence. There’s no use in talking, and there’s no one to talk to anyways. Is it so hard to guess that I’m content with losing my voice from silence over the course of a few days? That I only will talk if there’s something to talk about, which there’s none if I’m alone. Same goes for talking to her: I don’t enjoy her pimples, I don’t like kids, I don’t like parties. I have no common interests beyond skiing, and even then I snowboard and don’t know what to talk about even with other snowboarders, so how on earth can I have a friendly conversation with her about nothing? This is why it feels transactional, and I don’t know how to go about it. 

There is no way to make her feel the same hurt that I do. If she ever even does feel bad about how I act and crumble, then she does a damn good job of hiding it. If she doesn’t feel anything about it, then I wouldn’t be shocked either, she has no qualms cutting off her first daughter from her life. Why have a second one if the first one turned out shitty too? I’m probably a failed second attempt to her, and it hurts but also gives me a sort of sick satisfaction how it might not be entirely my fault, either. To an extent, I pity her too: no close family bonds, and her own children are distant to her. She argued with her husband often, and I honestly feel like if I were in her spot I would’ve made headlines with a suicide by now. In all, she’s a stranger to me, and one that I can’t befriend. If I were to miraculously improve the situation years later, I’d never be able to look at her with the contents of this rant and everything else I leave unsaid still in my head. Why does she act so surprised whenever I take her words close to heart? She’s my mom, the only one, and one I’m grateful to. But of course, how can I not take her every word specially, different from a friend or random guy on the street? Why does she expect me to be unaffected? 

For all that I try to compartmentalize every thought and situation I’m in that’s not just basic happy or annoyance or neutrality, I still fail to understand myself. What is the issue, the jam in the system or where is the fucked up line 40 in my code for normal human behavior? Where is the ordered, clear reason for my shitty ability at functioning as an emotionally healthy human adult? Anything that reminds me of her I treat with annoyance and anger, from pimples to massaging to orange hair to those slow, dry English learning videos on YouTube voiced by A.I. I hope I never become as cold as she is, yet I hope I can beat her one day in this emotional battleground. I’m sure it’s mostly my fault, but it very well can’t be only mine.

Changing my behavior suddenly will probably only really earn her mockery. If I did anything loving or ask for a hug, she’d ask me if I was sick and jokingly check my temperature with her hand. It makes me feel sick, and I refuse to make any family-like gestures with her now, even when she gets the random urge to hug me in public after a smaller argument (one moment we’re arguing and I’m getting upset, and then she drops it all and tries to give me a very tender hug and kiss. It’s sickening.) In all honesty, her actions like this, and calling me cute nicknames when we’re arguing (calling me “dochenka” or a cute version of my name and shit if we’re arguing but just calling me by my normal name any other time) make me scared to ever date anyone - I don’t think I’ll ever hear such pet names as anything good. I’ll always think of that, my dad calls me by then too but at least it’s not malicious. Having said that, I always still remember her orange hair whenever someone calls me that anyways. Iva craved a hug from her before and still do crave the love and approval an idealistic mother in a hypothetical family would have for her child, but I doubt I’ll ever get it. 

Whenever I strive for something, it’s with two things in mind: do well so that I like the outcome, and do well to make my parents (mom) proud. I don’t tell her or my dad about my slipping grades this year - I can’t handle their disappointment again. To a degree, I’m content with just floating by in life if it means I gain some kind of peace, but that’ll never happen - the thing I fear most is being useless in life, and ad much as I am an optimistic person in daily life, I’m undoubtedly a butter pessimist about my own future. Really, I just don’t want to end up like her. Working a job that no longer pays well, worrying about money, and living every single day the same way. It’s depressing.

If I ask her what’s wrong (when something is very clearly and obviously wrong), she’ll tell me it’s nothing and that she’s “used to it”. So, she lies in the first half and then packs a second lunch in the other. When I ask for details, she brushes me off like there’s absolutely nothing I can do because it’s all lost meaning. I can’t very well act like another person, I’ve tried and failed, and it feels like giving up on myself too. I wish there was a way to change mg personality, or my thought process. I’m never motivated to do anything because I always just remember this situation, and how any personal work such as working out will just result in my failure and lukewarm at best feelings about it.

There were no love letters and she was not followed.

When she filed her initial complaint with Constable Lennon her narrative was that she was spoken to two times.   There was no "love letter" narrative!  There were no allegations that I was sending her "love letters".

When she escalated her complaint the next day to Constable McCormick the narrative was still that I had spoken to her two times!  There was still no "love letter" narrative!  She was still not alleging that I was sending her "love letters".

A year and a half later when I confronted her and accused her of falsely maligning me as a stalker she called the RCMP.  It was only when she was being accused of falsely maligning me as a predator that she fabricated her "love letter" narrative!

Her "love letter" narrative to the RCMP was that she was receiving a constant stream of "love letters" both morning and evening as she was going to work and leaving work.   She told the RCMP that she still had those "love letters".

When she was later asked to turn over those "love letters" to the police as evidence she suddenly remembered that the "love letters" she claimed to be receiving and claimed to still have in her possession had been thrown out.

Then at trial the constant stream of "love letters" that she had told the RCMP she had been receiving was now just "three love letters".

Her story is completely inconsistent and begins with NO ALLEGATIONS of  receiving "love letters" when she filed her initial complaint.  A complaint that she would escalate the next day and still make NO ALLEGATIONS of receiving "love letters".   She did NOT start alleging receiving "love letters" until she was being accused of falsely maligning me as a stalker.   And when she started  to allege receiving "love letters" she also claimed that she still had those "love letters" in her possession.  Her claim that she still had those "love letters" in her possession she would later reverse by saying that she had forgotten that she had thrown them out.

She also falsely alleged that I was following her.  An allegation that she only substantiated by claiming that she could "feel" that she was being followed and that she had a "photographic memory". 

She apparently feels that she can falsely claim to have concerns for her safety and use those false claims to justify falsely maligning me as a stalker and intrude upon my personal privacy.

She appears to be of the opinion that my outrage over being falsely maligned as a predator is unjustified.  She claims that my outrage over being falsely maligned as a predator lends credibility to her false allegations and claims.

Further she is of the opinion that my outrage over her intrusion upon my privacy is unjustified.  She claims that my outrage over her intrusion upon my privacy proves her alleged "concerns for her safety" to have merit.  She is of the opinion that my outrage over her intrusion upon my privacy makes her alleged "concerns for her safety" reasonable.

Her "love letter" narrative is obviously false.

The narrative that I was turned down by her and then became angry and started harassing her is also false.

The truth is that I only spoke to her on two separate occasions in the span of nine months.  Once in November 1999 and once again in July 2000.   There were NO love letters and she was NOT being followed.   Her claim that she could "feel" that she was being followed does not in anyway mean that she was actually being followed nor does it prove that she was being followed.  Her vain attempt at lending credibility to her story by claiming to have a "photographic memory" is laughable at best considering how many times she has changed her story and how much she claims to have simply forgotten.

Although I suppose I can't entirely fault her for "forgetting" details of what happened when it was 24 years ago that I last spoke to her.  I am in complete and utter disbelief that this woman feels that she has the right to falsely malign me as a stalker, intrude upon my privacy, and allege having "concerns for her safety" because she was spoken to two times by a stranger 24 years ago.

Absolutely absurd!  Absolutely absurd that people believe anything this woman is saying.  Absolutely absurd that people agree that my outrage over being falsely maligned as a predator and having my privacy intruded upon is unjustified.  Absolutely absurd that people agree with her that my outrage over being falsely maligned and deprived of my privacy makes her alleged "concerns for her safety" realistic and reasonable.

I am not going to forced to be victim of this kind of insanity any longer!

I met my boyfriend at work almost two years ago. He was actually co-owner of the small coffee shop I worked at. He started dating someone while I was working there, and they dated for 8 or 9 months before breaking up, in October of 2024. They then went to couple's counseling together, hoping to repair their relationship. In February of 2025, I noticed my boss was looking at me in a different way. We would text, and we would see each other more often at work. Mostly, we would just talk. About school or our beliefs and other random things. In March, he began to flirt. He would compliment my glasses, ask why I was blushing, tease me over silly things, staying for my whole shift, walking me out to my car, etc. I wasn't sure what his situation was with his ex. Then, in April, we started hanging out outside of work. He had asked me to pick him up and take him somewhere, and every night for the next two weeks we hung out. We would drive around our small town, park at random places, and talk. One day, he finally kissed me. At this point, I knew he was in couple's counseling with his ex. He had told me he intended to marry her. He even had a ring custom made, sitting in a jewelry shop. We ended up doing more than kissing on a couple of occasions. I had never been kissed before this, had never done anything. I'd never even had a boyfriend. We ended things a couple of times because of his relationship with his ex. We both knew what we were doing was wrong, but we kept ending up together. People at work found out and told his ex. She called me and asked me if I knew they were in therapy, if I knew they were planning on getting engaged, and if I knew they were trying to repair their relationship. I told her I did. I lost a lot of friends. All of my work friends. Eventually, I had to quit my job, because his parents owned it and didn't want me working there anymore. His sister called me and told me what I was doing was wrong. I found out yesterday that my grandparents told my aunt that I'm a homewrecker and a slut. I knew my boyfriend still loved her. I knew everything. I chose to continue anyway. I have so much guilt over it, but he tells me not to. He says that she had made it clear to him that she didn't want to fix their relationship, which I find hard to believe since they were going to therapy. His ex blocked me on everything, but not him.   Nobody that I worked with talks to me anymore. My sister and mom still judge me for it. I just don't know how to deal with the guilt. I love my boyfriend, and I think I'm finally comfortable believing that he loves me. I don't regret dating him. But the way that it happened makes me feel sick. I can't tell people or they might think I'm saying it to look good or to hear them tell me that what I did wasn't wrong. I know what I did was wrong. I do. I don't want people to tell me otherwise. I just wish I knew what to do with all these feelings.

I feel like everything is my fault.
Back in 2023, I used to fight a lot with my mom, to the point we couldn't stand eachother. Most of my insecurities have been caused by her, like "being cheeky" or "flat chested". She didn't used to hit me a lot, but god, it was so fucking scary when she did, I remember in 2022, I accidentally broke a glass cup, I was beaten up by her that night.. I remember crying in the bathroom to the point I couldn't cry no more, I remember talking to my bestfriend at the moment, telling her what my mom did. Somenthing I'm never going to forget, is her asking if my mom was even normal, I didn't thought much about it back then, but I started questioning that to my self in 2023, Is she normal?

One day, In carnivals (I live in spain) I asked my mom if I could go to my dads house to grab my makeup, cause I left it there (my parents are divorced), She got so mad for asking her that, but she let me go anyways. It turned out to be the worst day of my life, and if someone could bring me back there, I don't actually know if I would ask her or not. When I got back home, we had a big fight, where she ended up taking everything away from my room (even my pillows, lol) just because I didn't want to shower that night... (kinda fucked up, right? I have just realised that while writting this)
I don't what went through my mind that day, what I felt, why I felt danger, and I wasn't even wrong (wich I could hope I was), but I took out my phone and started recording, everything felt so unreal that day.. She noticed, and asked for my phone, shouting at me, I didn't want to hang over the phone.. and here comes my trauma, the fucked up thing. She pinned me down on my bed, and started hitting me, she dug her nails into my skin, lifting my skin, when she got up and left (just like nothing happend), I ran to the bathroom, and when I saw blood coming out of the open wound I had on my leg, I just broke in tears, looking at my self on the mirror, and thinking, "what the fuck had just happened?". That night, I had the worse anxiety attack you could ever imagine, I called my dad, my friends, asking for help. I don't really want to tell you more, because I don't want cry and concern my dad again over this.. He thinks I'm better now, even though I'm not. The only thing I can tell you, is that the cops came to what I used to call home that night and took me with my father. I went to the hospital, to the police.. One thing I will never forget, is my grandma (my mom's mom) sending me a message that said "GO TO HELL"..

I live with my dad since then, and I have seen her 1 time since that, to go and watch the barbie movie (wich is one of the reasons my eyes fill with tears when I hear "What was I made for"). But, anyway, I just feel everything it's my fault, even though people say it's not, it's just like I feel they don't understand, I just don't know, Or they don't know..

Now that I have vent about that, I also want to tell everything I've experienced since then. Currently, I am 14 years old, and I'm having to experience adolesnce without a mom. And believe when I say, it's fucked up. Like, it's not like it hurts, because I know it is something I won't experience and won't ever have. But it hurts, it hurts seeing my friends going shopping with their moms, my cousins talking about fashion with their moms, and the little ones cuddling with them, or giving their moms kisses and hugs. It hurts seeing how they get their hair brushed, that they tell them about their crushes, or people they find attractive, that they have a women who guides them through girlhood. It hurts so bad that I'm the only one of my social circle that can't look up to someone important, to her mom. And, I mean, I'm not complaining, because I have an amazing dad, but it still hurts, because it's not the same.. because no many times I say this shit or people try to understand me, they can't understand me, no matter how hard they can, they just can't. And it fucking hurts so bad to see them worried about me, to see my aunt and my grandmother crying, to look at my cousin just staring at me, not saying a word, to also worry my bestfriend, who actually wrote what I'm about to put "I feel so fucking bad, because I can't help, and it is so fucking hurting as well seeing you cry, because I can't do anything to make you feel better. And it hurts me even more because I know everytime we go shopping with my mom, I know that you want that, and I feel so fucking terrible". So yeah, that's what she said, I spent the whole afternoon crying at that text.. I just don't want to worry anyone with my shit
I just want a mom.

I don't know how to separate myself from the survival trauma I had endured growing up .. to now.
I have no idea if I'm ever saying the wrong thing, feeling the wrong thing. even with words I mean with all my heart, I worry it would be taken as manipulation, or .. love bombing, or a test with wrong answers. 
I'm scared of rejection, if I'll end up hurting the ones I love now .. with all my uncertainty, and not knowing that I am looking, pleading, for understanding despite the steps I took in my compromises and sacrifices that I hold by. but .. when it's all said and done, showering the ones I love in all the support and unconditional love they always deserve.. I always end up with that sinking feeling. the dread, the loneliness of the overlook they always give .. and I never realize until the issue is resolved. 
and when I feel broken, unable to tear from my bed afterwards .. I don't have the heart to ever tell them what lacked for me in the end. what I hoped for, what words I was searching to hear .. or reassurance, that mirroreddedication. 
I can't. because they are determined to do better by themselves, and I'm still here; stuck- yet adoring how they've grown more into themselves. 

I know I can't change, can't leave my house because the world is still too dark and terrifying. I know it would be selfish to expect or even want someone to dip a little into that darker side, to trust you enough .. that you'd protect them. it would help you feel connected to someone..

 I.. just don't know how to tell the between my trauma talking .. telling me I sound just like my abusers did. or if I come across as genuine as I feel .. even with the unexpected heaviness in myself afterwards. I always mean it, always take responsibility.. but .. that hope that he would somehow understand or see that I'm trying to be strong, I'm hurting too .. I feel alone in my head- never seems to go away.

and I forgot it's there, every single time.

he's not a bad person, the opposite- actually. he's amazing, and everything good I never thought I'd experience after a life filled with walking on broken glass. and maybe it's because we're so different in those ways .. that I can't seem to work through my own confusion and what I feel I lose each talk. 

please let me know your thoughts<3 negative, positive or neutral.

So, I’ve been friends with this girl for around 3 years or so. We’re both 16, just finished our exams. The thing is, I have a huge crush on her, but I’m scared it’s going to completely ruin our friendship.
Honestly, I wouldn’t be the person I am today without her. My last years at school would’ve been a nightmare if not for her. She says that I helped her gain confidence and that i’m good at talking to people, but it’s been the other way around this whole time. She’s the one that built my confidence up. I was able to talk to others because she was with me. Because she’s funny, caring, hardworking, sociable, confident. And beautiful, god she’s so beautiful. 
That’s the problem. I don’t want to love her this way. I just want to go back to when we were simply friends. But the more time I spent with her — spending every breaktime, sometimes lunchtimes, and being her platonic prom date — I started to become selfish. I got jealous of the guys she’d talk to, I thought about what it would be like if I became her girlfriend, or boyfriend. Anything. I feel bad about this. I hate having thoughts like this because as much as I love her and want to be with her and kiss her and hold her, I value our friendship too much to say anything. Her friendship has always been one of the most important things to me, but I can’t help but feel giddy when she talks to me now. If I ever say anything, I know she’ll reject me because she constantly talks about new guys she’s talked to or she tries to set me up with other people. I don't even know where to start this. I feel like there's so many parts of my life I'm so deeply confused over that it's difficult to pick something to focus on to keep this from becoming utter nonsense. 

I don't know how to qualify abuse. I have so many memories from when I was younger that now in retrospect feel deeply wrong, but I don't know how to make sense of them. I just know something's wrong, and I think I've been stewing in that feeling for at least five years now. My mother's been a substance addict for as long as I can remember, mostly weed and alcohol. When I was younger though I remember her buying five + bottles of Robitussin every week when we'd go to the pharmacy, so there were probably others. She's not horrible when she's sober, I think she might still think she's doing well as a parent. Maybe she's trying her best, that makes everything I feel worse though. Children aren't supposed to feel this level of negativity (disdain?) to their parents.

I shouldn't have had to see my mom high or drunk so many times that it was a better bet that I'd see her passed out on the couch, or so belligerent she'd start an argument with anyone who looked at her wrong. I shouldn't have known what a bong was at age 7. It wasn't normal I had such a strong hatred twords anyone who used drugs and was a parent when I was younger, that's not a bias most people need to work through. Normal seven year olds have never held a knife to their throat. I shouldn't have had to get so used to shouting coming from downstairs that I could blend the noise into the background. My mom shouldn't have punched my dad, and I wish I had never learned that was something that had even happened. She shouldn't have put my interests down so often, even if she was worried about my income in the field I used to be so passionate about. She shouldn't have called me a selfish fucking person for not wanting to give her my only inhaler when her script wasn't ready to fill yet, or when I wouldn't loan her my own personal belongings (she breaks shit all the time, or leaves it at work). Fuck, she should have at least smoked outside. She knew I was asthmatic but no matter how many times anyone told her she just didn't care. She should have let my have privacy, and she shouldn't have groped me to check my development, or slapped my ass, or made those comments about my body it makes me feel sick to think about, but I can't even tell if I'm being oversensitive because the first time I reached out about that on the Internet I was called an oversensitive kid. But I feel disgusting.

I spent half of my childhood terrified of if my parents were going to divorce each other, and the other half wishing they'd just get it over with already. I've never felt heard by my parents, my mom is a wreck, and my dad never knew how to react about it (though he was always unapproachable, an emotional wall, he punished me for experiencing symptoms of depression because he couldn't understand that a child in this situation wasn't fine— that I was suffering and couldn't stop staying up till 5 and sleeping 12 hours, and cutting my wrists until my arm was covered in blood. But I care about him, he was supposed to protect me, I love him, if I keep to our shared interests and avoid emotional topics I like hanging out with him. what happened?) Ugh, standing up for people who just love to point fingers and nitpick everything you do? That’ll suck the life outta you faster than a Monday morning meeting. Seriously, it’s like you’re stuck on defense 24/7, juggling their drama and your own sanity with zero thanks—just more complaints. You pour your energy into justifying yourself, but do they ever appreciate it? Nope. It chips away at your confidence, leaves you doubting yourself, and, honestly, starts to feel like you’re carrying a backpack full of bricks. Headaches, tired all the time, cranky—yeah, it’ll do that to you. Before you know it, you’re feeling alone, worthless, just plain worn out from always being the bad guy in someone else’s story.

So, what now? Well, you gotta draw some lines. Seriously—set up boundaries like your life depends on it, because, well, your mental health kinda does. Don’t be afraid to show yourself some love, either. Hang out with people who actually get it, who won’t just pile on more blame. Once you see how toxic that blame game is, you can start dodging it and protecting your peace. Take care of yourself first, manage your energy, and don’t be shy about saying “nah” to the nonsense. It’ll make all the difference, trust me.

" you forgot "insert unimportant task" FIL always says " I'm spending time with my grandkids" and she gets annoyed.
She is always rude and annoyed with the kids, they're all well-behaved for their ages. She's not at all loving, warm, or kind to them. It's too the point where I don't want her to watch our children because of how she treats them.

Even after baby is home and we're adjusting to being a bigger family and finally ready for visits. MIL is busy finishing off a bottle of wine by herself when we come to see them. My mother was an alcoholic, basically threw her life away and I feel like its my fault. I moved to another state with my dad in 6th grade, leaving her and my little sister (half sister same mom diff dad). It was because I fell in love with this new state and the one we had lived in was literally unsafe. But her alchohal abuse got worse. I was unaware of this until 7th grade. My parents told me I wasn't allowed to talk to her anymore because of her problems, that she needed to hit rock bottom in order to get help. I remember the next day breaking down in the school hallway just trying to explain what happened. Fast forward to a little over a year later. I had been resentful towards her. She divorced her 4th husband and I refused to speak to her, I was angry. I would shit talk her at school and everything. But one day, I realized maybe she needed more support, not rock bottom. I wanted her to be my mom again. So I decided that Saturday I would call her. I was so excited. I remember imagining how it would go, we would plan a trip together, all that. Friday, the day before I was gonna do it, my dad let me stay home. He said its because my grandma was in town and on the way. My step mom was supposed to be at work, my dad called off. I thought nothing of it. So that morning it was normal, was playing hello neighbor, my dad was helping me through the harder puzzles, it was great. I started to think something was wrong when my step mom walked through the front door with my grandma. My grandma gave me a hug and a smile but it didn't quite reach her eyes. Then they sat on the couch and told me to sit as well. I still remember my dad's voice cracking and them all crying for me, when he told me that morning my mom died. That was the only time I had ever seen my dad cry. I couldn't say anything but no, over and over again. I couldn't breathe, or see through my tears. I can't help but wonder, what if. What if I had called her sooner, what if I hadn't cut her off in the first place, what if I'd never moved away. I never got to tell her I loved her. Never got to say goodbye. She overdosed. I never told anyone this, so at least this way, someone will know.

I have a discord friend where ive grown close to this one girl. She vent a lot to me, share her problems. We update wht we do each day. 

Im not the type to open up easily but with her i feel like i can truat her with some part of me. At least i can show her my real self. Not the 'online' me only. 

Thing is she confessed to me. I have to reject. We are at a different stage of life. She was 5 years behind me. Im freshly in my twenties. So we stay. Stay as friends. I told her she can move on soon. Time will do its job. 

I hate how she made me feel like i was special. Like i was needed. I cannot deny that i too have mutual feelings as her. 

But as time goes, i dont know what happen. She suddenly stop texting as often as before and i didnt ask why. In my head, maybe its because we are already in a friend group where she got close w other members too. 

Or maybe something happened and she didnt know if she should say it to me. I dont wanna ask. Instead, i wait for her to maybe open up someday. 

And that day never come. 

Less private message and slightly often in public server and groupchats. I am still ok w it as long as i know she is how she is. 

I did muster a courage to text her first. I ask why is she still awake so late. Is she ok. I did it twice. And she didnt respond. She ghost me. Ofc i was a little hurt by that but again, to see her active even for a bit in the server is all i care about. 

This stage we still do text like normal. She like this guy. Same school as her. Same class. Like a dream come true type of guy. Im jealous. But deepdown i am thankful. That perhaps this is the chance for her to move on.

I watch her. Her way of text. And also that guy she likes. But to me, its odd. At first i shrug it off. Thinking it was just a mere jealousy. 

But no. My theory was proven 90% correct. So at least thats how i value it. That guy she likes doesnt actually exist. It was her secret account. Her alternative account. 

I know this bcs of the similar phone screenshot, both chat too fast to be two person talking and the way they chat is so similar. 

Not only that, when she said she wanna join vc using her laptop. She mentioned how she is scared to accidently open her camera. Which i reassure that wont happen unless you click the camera button. 

Then i wait for her to join. Guess what. It was that dude who join. Not her. Which was weird. Bcs in the server that dude isnt even talking. The moment he join the call he left almost immediately. 

Which again confirmed my suspicion. 

So to that, i close my case that the guy she love is actually just her alt account. 

Then start from here we started to part. She got many irl problems and probably dont wanna bother telling. But i hate it. I hate how we felt so cold and distance now. 

She clearly wanna cut ties with me. Along with my other friends. She suddenly unfriend us. And when my other friend friend req her. She didnt even accept. 

Weird. 

She said it was an accident. But didnt bother accepting. I understand if she wont accept mine but others? 

I hate being someone who doesnt reach out first. Im afraid itll annoy her. Im afraid itll make her hate me even more. 

And to that. I regret. I feel hopeless. We lose our spark. Im not talking based about my feelings to her. But in general. We make a great group of 5 friends. And now? Its no longer the same. 

I miss the old us. 

That is all. I apologies for not being strong enough. I wish you'd reach out to me. For i really do treasure your comfort. 

I know that sometimes letting go is the best possible outcome. Yet. Its difficult. 

This is the only place where i can express my feelings. I never and will never speak of this again. Though the thoughts sure would haunt me.

I feel like I’m grieving over a childhood I never got to have, I’m 17 and will be turning 18 this year, and I’ve been homeschooled since I was very young,

 I was first pulled out of public school when I was around maybe 6? I can’t remember exactly when but it was because I was apparently being bullied, but the thing is I was never put back in public school, and I feel like that severely affected my life, 

 never did sports, or choir, or learned how to play an instrument, I never did drama, never been in any clubs, I don’t have friends, I don’t go out to many places, I suck at socializing, and I struggle with what should be middle school level mathematics

My moms not really here to teach me most of the time, she’s a work, or she’s sleeping all day cause she does night shift, or she’s smoking, or she’s tired and complaining about something and I’m to sensitive to bother her about anything cause I’ll feel like a burden if I do,

 and the only time I’m ever made to do schoolwork is when she needs a sample for my homeschool program to prove I’m “learning”, and even then I don’t feel like I retain much, sometimes she’ll fill out a few of the things for me to get it over with and will tell me to come back to it later, but I just don’t have any motivation to come back it to it, I never do, my “school” life has no structure whatsoever, I have ADHD, we both suspect I have autism, and I have another neurological condition I prefer not to name but that also impacts my ability to learn, if she’s not cut out to be a special ed teacher why is she homeschooling me in the first place.

I feel so behind and isolated compared to everyone else my age, sometimes I fantasize what it would be like going to high school, being in a classroom, having real teachers, real deadlines, real structure, real socialization, going to clubs, hanging out with friends, going to prom, getting in trouble like all the other high schoolers my age are, but it’s too late for that now, I’m going to graduate soon without ever having gone to middle school or high school, it makes me cry, I’ve missed out on so much of my formative years and I’ll never know what’s it’s like firsthand being a high schooler

It makes me think about my brother, let’s call him V for anonymity’s sake, V is basically everything I’ve ever wanted to be, he has a friend group, he went to public school, he’s smart, successful, going to trade school, he has hobbies and goes out on the town, he’s emotionally well adjusted than I am, he did choir and drama, the list goes on really, I can’t help but be envious of him, he has life figured out and it all seems so simple for him, and Im scared for my future, whether or not I’ll be able to hold down a job, whether or not I’ll be able to make friends, whether or not it’s too late to be explore my interest.


TLDR: being homeschooled was the worst thing that happened to me and I’m afraid it’s too late to have a normal childhood

I feel like everyone is incompetent. Back in school, I've only ever found two classmates whose work I could classify as better than average, whereas the vast majority was below average. However, it wasn't necessarily because they weren't intelligent; they were just absurdly incompetent. At 12 or so I started attending therapy sessions, and in some months I was diagnosed with autism level 1 (more specifically Asperger's Syndrome, although this terminology is not used anymore), which explained most things. The problem is that I have met two other autistic people and we are almost opposites. Okay; one of them also has ADHD and dislexia, but even then, they care little for rules or simple responsibility. The one with ADHD is my friend, and he convinced me to pursue a degree in Software Engineering alongside him. One semester goes by and I realize I don't want to make software, but that's another thing; what I'm saying is that he displayed a complete lack of compromise with the studies, often going home as soon as possible (even though the class ended 30 to 40 minutes later) and not trying the minimum he could to understand the topics. Once he realized the university wasn't going to have pity on him, he rushed to the academic support center to see what they could do for him, and that's when he actually got a diagnosis for dislexia and autism. So far it's not so condemnable, but he simply tried to take advantage off of their help; they let him take the exams alone in a room (I mean, with a tutor, of course), and it had to be some days later from the actual exam, and he then thought it'd be a great idea to just ask me the questions because they were the same. I do not need to say that the only real knowledge he got from the last semester is that "printf" is how you show text in C. That paired with him frequently going out to parties while bragging about how autism sucks and drinking because "he's an adult" makes me sick. My other friend can actually do her work, but she's fallen into cigarettes and wasting her time drinking with drug addicts in a random bar, which hit me like a rock. Another thing is a project I had to do with that friend with ADHD and a random classmate that joined our group: we had to make a little presentation about the paraconsistent logic and its applications in I.T., with slides, of course. My friend would talk about the Schrödinger's Cat experiment, I would present the applications themselves and our classmate would briefly introduce the paraconsistent logic. I'm not joking; my friend's slide was 4 paragraphs from ChatGPT and our classmate's slide was three phrases, and that was literally everything they did. I had to get into the paraconsistent logic itself because the other guy talked for less than 20 seconds. We were the last group to make the presentation, but the others weren't any better; their research wasn't actually that bad, but they couldn't understand that a slide does not consist of never ending walls of text and that the presentation does not consist of dancing around in nervousness while literally looking back at the slide and reading word by word. And I can't feel confidence from some of my tutors; one of them literally did not look me in the eyes once if I didn't ask them something directly. She also couldn't understand that 120 minutes is the maximum threshold for a book to be considered a quick read, not the minimum (this was in an exam, and she told me to read the question again when I pointed it). Clarifying something I said earlier, I said I ranted about the university, and that's because I could point a gramatical error almost everywhere. This is something I see in almost everything, actually; it's a common thought to the people in my country that our language is one of the hardest to learn (Portuguese... yeah...), and maybe it is a bit hard, but the sheer lack of concern with their own language is simply infuriating to me. It's Brazil, to be "cool" is to hear absolutely disgusting 'music' and act as if you were a criminal. Sure, this is only among young people for the most part, but something built-in in everyone is the need to feel that they've taken advantage over someone in some way or another, paired with an admiration for the futile. My friend, for example, simply didn't have the honor to focus on his studies and try hard; he preferred to be weak and go for the effortless (but also fruitless) path. This is my disappointing view of my own country. However, there definitely are a lot of great and honorable people out there, but it's just so incredibly difficult to find one if not on the internet. Changing topics slightly, recently I've joined a group for a game jam (Pirate Software game jam); we are a team of five beginners trying to make something... or I should say, a team of 1.5. As you can suppose, it's an international event, and we are all from different countries. Actually, I can only say that for three of us (including me) with certainty; the other two didn't attend the initial Discord call to discuss somethings about the game, but one might be from the UK or from Spain, while another is from the Netherlands, another is from the US and I am from Brazil. Past the first day, only the American and I have done something, although she it's been 10 days and she has delivered 8 16x16 sprites in total. The Netherlands guy has disappeared, the other one probably sent 15 words in total and the last guy has been supposedly working on the inventory for 7 days now. I totally understand them if they have to work and whatever, but if you're going to have one hour per day to help, you'd be better off going alone or at the very least ask if someone needs help somewhere. This got me thinking if maybe this is all just the western culture, because I expected a lot more compromise from people from first world countries. Whatever, it's 2:18 am and I have lost the motivation to work on the game, literally the only thing that wasn't done by me are eight sprites, the light around the player and the tilemap, which is an easy way to literally paint the map with little blocks or tiles (the art he used is a free asset). I just wanted to find someone of my age in real person who was compromised and whose base ideals I considered honorable, and yet here I am ranting as if I were any better than anyone. I don't consider myself naturally superior, but other people are just so uninterested that I will naturally feel superior to them because they don't come up to the standards I put to myself. Also, I don't know if anyone will read this, but if so, then I apologize for making you read a giant wall of text about something unimportant. Have a good night.

The only thing i can think of besides me sleeping at 4am and waking at 12:30pm, is genes, though my family all have great hair for their age on both sides, full heads of hair, just graying, it'll effect my self esteem and confidence even more, as if things couldn't get worse. 

But it can, the reality of having an STD, ive dated 2 people in my life(surprised? Definitely not) the 1st was highschool, though I'm finding out 10 years later it was more a "situationship" as they call it, fucking guys while I was left thinking we were more, then after college meeting my wife online, catching herpies from her, the first week i visited her, i went through all the symptoms of someone who had been infected, it felt like hell, I've held a small amount of resentment for it, this disgusting break out on my lips, I feel ashamed and embarrassed, now it's my life, I don't get break outs down below, but it doesnt matter, I think either way I'm going to die alone one way or another, like I said, karma, not to beat a dead horse. 

It's making me realize, while I'm jobless trying to "find" a job because my degree doesn't exist here, while my wife makes enough to support us both and live fairly comfortably, you can be given everything, surrounded by nice people who care, who do things for you, things you don't deserve, yet still be unhappy. 

Money may not buy happiness, but id be happier not in 11k debt with $800 left to my name in attempts to save my credit, my family occasionally sends me money, I hate it, but there's nothing I can do, not too long ago I was at $300, any longer and I'd not be able to pay my credit card and my credit would start to plummet, I'm not strict with money, i saved 25k before meeting my wife, I didn't mind spending on friends for food, drinks, going out, I didn't care, I was financially safe and ensuring they had a good time was all that mattered, so being given money is like stabbing me in the heart, pathetic, I can't pay for anything, everyone treats me like a hurt puppy because this shit hole of a place doesn't recognize my degree, it's nothing major, but it got me decent paying jobs back home with a clear career path in the industry I'm interested in, now I'm sitting here on the couch on my ass with the only work available being heavy labor blue collar jobs, I'm a twig, I'm weak, I can't do it, i can't do those jobs, I'm not someone who can handle it, I'm privileged I know, it's obvious I am, I took what I had for granted in my home country and now I'm left here depressed and broke. I don't want to ask for help despite in desperate need of it, because I don't want to be a burden, i dont want to be a bother, everyone has their own life and own problems to deal with, it's just a part of growing up, im on my own, I refuse to ask for money. People have tried helping me here, but it's in vein, I want to leave, we spent 2500 to get my license after a year, I know it'll be waste if I end up going back, but I don't care, I'll pay it back, i don't like having debts owded to people, if it's work I can do. I'll work hard, I pride myself on my work ethic, the only thing worth being prideful. I'm a nobody and that's okay, but I have 1 life and this isn't how I want to live it.

The Dark Side Of Emergency Vet Med.

It's not the clicky groups.
It's not the theft of drugs
and trust me it's not the horrid smell of tampon dog vomit.


We do this job often for one reason, we love and care about animals.
Unfortunately working in this field has the aspect of death.
We do the best we can with the worst situations possible.
Yet...
We aren't allowed to stop.
but owners have final say on most things.
"Push further."
"Do everything!"
"Money isn't a problem."
So we are pushed further, we do e.v.e.r.y.  t.h.i.n.g.
We see them, treat them, and care for them our entire 10-12hr shift sometimes up to our entire work week.

These events spanned over 5 hours post operation and i'd like to share just one example of what we deal with weekly at minimum.

11 year old dog on the decline after surgery.
"keep going."
So we try more drugs, half hour full TPRs, SPO2, BG, Lactate.
 
The battle for them isn't guaranteed a win just because they made it out of the O.R.
Still on the decline if not showing clear signs of suffering at this point.
Transfusions now required because PCV was a whole 11%.

"Do it."
Transfusion takes 3 hours.
Starts defecating blood everywhere in the kennel.
Ends up lateral after four separate instances of HGE in the span of 2 hours.

Alive but lethargic, unwilling to get up or hold own weight.
ECG, More drugs, U-cath, AUS, more transfusions.... all approved by the owner for THE NEXT MORNING.
Keep him going 5 hours after surgery, and more drugs; norepi, fentanyl, doxycycline, plasma even.

lo' n behold 30 minutes before my shift ended, the morning of all his approved diagnostics.
He's not breathing...

HE'S NOT BREATHING

CPR positive, a whole 3% chance at “survival”.
Everyone around who can help is rushing over, Crash cart ready, compressions....

The fucking COMPRESSIONS.
Ever snap a healthy stick before? Well, we do that to the ribs most of the time in order to compress the heart and get the blood flowing through their body often occurs on smaller dogs.
Compression rounds lasting 2 minutes I ended up being next so I stood by ready to go.

PULSE!...pulse? NO WHY... PLEASE
There it was, we managed to start his heart again.
Dr was on the phone with the owner strongly recommending humane euthanization as there was no chance of fully coming back from this.
Still breathing for him with an o2 line and ambu bag, brain dead at this point with a less than 0% chance of "living".

Dog codes again, we act and continue compressions.
Blood now POURING out of the trake tube we placed earlier.
suctioning as much out as we can, blood all over the floor pooling below his face.
Owner finally calls stop.

We clean up.

Put the body in the freezer.

Get back to work because getting fired isn't an option.

For 5 hours I was paid to watch this animal die while we struggled to keep him alive.
5 hours with this animal without his people, terrified.
5 hours…. all for what? 

Working this career for the last 6 years has changed me, and I'll be honest It wasn't for the best.

Dear Amanda:

I'm grown enough to know that business is business and some decisions are strictly that: Business.

I'm 33 years old, and I knew that even when I was a 20 year old undergraduate and I worked for you part-time while I put my way through school.

However, your facade of coming off as supportive and compassionate quickly fading to overworking me and then blindsiding me with termination, even 13 years later, still traumatizes me.

I have since gotten my Bachelor's and followed it up a few years later with my MBA. Hell, in the next 12 months I'm getting my CPA. It doesn't take away from the fact that after what you did to me, I wake up every morning for work in constant fear.

Even as a manager with 11 years experience, I wake up in constant fear that I'm going to go to work and I'm gonna be terminated.

I hope protecting your boyfriend, who worked in the warehouse at the same company, as he wrote down the wrong weights on product coming in and then blamed it on me because I was the one who entered it in the system, was worth me being traumatized.

I hope overworking me, telling me to do something I've never done before and then refusing to show me how to do it, was worth it.

I hope leaving me alone in the lunchroom to cry after you blindsided me with termination was worth it.

I will admit I silently gloated when the company closed down 3 years after you pulled my job out from underneath me. Your termination was a blindside just like mine was. However, I resent the fact that it took you two weeks to find a new job while it took me 5 months after you pulled my job from underneath me.

Twenty-three years later, I pray you're soul and spirit is in heaven.  Perhaps when life was and is hell, the reason why it's not worse is because of God and you.  I do not want another one.  I do not want another biological child.  Last night, I dreamt what it was like feeling you slide out of me.  Last night I dreamt of remembering being in the hospital and crying out to God why I was forced to feel what it was like to love something more than life itself, to love somethng more than I loved myself, to love something more than I lived my ex-husband, only to have you torn from me.

Science can grow human body parts, but can not resurrect.  Maybe I lost you to teach me what it meant to love something more than myself.  Maybe I lost you to teach me what it meant to become pro life instead of pro choice.  Maybe I lost you to be taught to live for someone else besides myself.  Maybe I lost you to teach me what it meant to see the sunshine through in a starless night in the desert.

In the hell of life, when I feel like giving up, giving in, when I want to go to heaven, to see you, touch your face, your little nose and fingers, when I want to go to heaven and see you, you died, but I lived.  I failed at bringing a life in being through my body into this world that made me want to safeguard other unborn life.

I do not understand what was wrong with my body and why God took you from me.  You starved to death at a time you felt pain.  You died because the umbilicle cord twisted so many times it cut off all nutrients from me to you.  It was seven months.  You could have lived outside my body in an incubator.  My body killed you.  My body caused you pain.  I would never want my body to kill anyone or cause anyone pain.  A life I wanted, a life I wanted to bring in this world, a life I loved more than anything else, my body caused you to starve to death.  Often, I hope and pray you did not feel pain, but I know you felt pain before you died.  Maybe that was why you kicked me so much.  I remember you kicking me.  Maybe you were kicking me because you were in pain and starving to death.

To this day, I cry when I think that something I loved and wanted more than my life and my ex-husband's life was perished because of starvation.  Cause of death:  Umbilicle cord twisted so many times that it cut off all nutrients to you.  They didn't know the cause of death until I gave natural birth to you.  They took FOURTEEN viles of blood from me.  No blood disease, no diseases, no illnesses, no sickness, no physical complications, but mental complicatons that last a lifetime.  

I almost died in the hospital.  Often, I wish I had died with you.  I was powerless to save you.  I'm sorry my body caused you pain.  I'm sorry my body caused you to starve to death.  I wish I had died in the hospital so I could be in heaven with you, grandma Adams, grandpa Adams, Holly, and Debbie.  

Tommorrow, you would be twenty-three.  June 19th is the worst day on the calendar.  I loved you.

Love wasnt when he slide his hands down my pants on the first date. Love was when he asked to kiss me first.

Love wasn’t telling me he didn’t want anything serious. Love was when he knew we couldn’t be together but still wanted to try. 
Love wasn’t when he barely told his mother my name. Love was when he told he told his parents all about me.
Love wasn’t when he kissed me in order to shut me up. Love was when he listened to me talk and never interrupted. 
Yet I will always choose the love that wasn’t. Its always too late when I miss the love that was.

I've never really felt loved by anyone, from childhood until now. It all began when my dad was working abroad, and I lived with my mom. She started spending a lot of time with another man, who even stayed at our house. I got suspicious and confronted her, but she brushed it off, saying, "Tell whoever you want, no one can do anything about it." Eventually, someone told my dad about it, and he asked me what was going on. I was scared, knowing the truth would cause a big fight, and I didn't want things to get worse, so I avoided answering. But my dad kept pushing, and I kept avoiding him until I eventually stopped talking to him. He got upset and told my mom, who acted clueless, and then he started telling everyone that I was a bad son for not answering him, which made my relatives start questioning me too. But what could I say?

By secondary school, the pressure of studies was high, and my dad kept asking me what was going on, promising he wouldn't tell anyone. I finally trusted him and told him the truth about my mom's affair, but the next day, he told everyone – relatives, neighbors, everyone. My mom got furious and abused me emotionally and physically. When my dad came back in November, things didn’t improve. My mom eventually left to live with her mom, leaving me with my dad. Later, I found out he was having an affair too. When I confronted him, he threatened me, saying no one would believe me and that he'd claim I was lying to get his phone. I was shocked and had panic attacks, even thinking about suicide. To protect himself, my dad blamed me for my parents’ separation, and everyone believed him.

I retreated into silence, became addicted to my phone, and my dad used me as a punching bag, beating me until I bled or burning me with an iron. Somehow, I made it to my school. A new girl joined my class, and after a few months, we started dating. She said I was the guy she needed, and I wanted to be faithful because of my parents’ affairs. But two months into the relationship, she confessed to sending nudes to two guys and sexting others before we met. I was crushed and reached out to my girl best friend, even though we hadn’t talked much since I started dating. I shared my girlfriend’s confession with her, which I knew was wrong, and I feared my girlfriend would be upset if she found out. In a panic, I lied to my girlfriend, saying I had kissed my best friend, hoping it would create distance between them.

But the truth came out when they met on my birthday. The next day, they both called me – my girlfriend wanted to break up, and my best friend wanted to end our friendship. After a lot of pleading and crying, I managed to save my relationship, with my best friend lying to help me. But I lost my entire friend group because my best friend was at the center of it. My girlfriend became my only friend, and while things settled down for a while, I couldn’t stop bringing up her past nudes. She also admitted to texting another guy during our relationship, telling him she had dreamt about having sex with him, which shattered me.

Meanwhile, my dad became more toxic, telling me I could go to any small school if I wanted to continue my education. I moved to a dormitory, for my higher education, where my roommates underestimated me because my results were poor. After six months, I returned home due to health issues. I was excited to reconnect with my girlfriend and focus on my studies, but our relationship turned toxic again. She had time for her friends but not for me, and she broke up, saying she needed to focus on her studies. Later, she called to apologize and confessed she had cheated on me with a girl in her dorm. I begged her to stay, but she and her new girlfriend laughed at me. I eventually stopped begging, but she called back, saying she made a mistake. Foolishly, I took her back.

By now, my dad was working abroad again, and I was living alone. The relationship was fine for a while but became toxic again. During this time, I found some peace by helping others on the 7cups app. It’s been seven months since we broke up. 

My mom is back now that my dad is gone, and she’s emotionally torturing me, sometimes refusing to cook. I do half the chores and get blackmailed constantly. I don’t know what she’s told my dad, but he’s refusing to support my education. I just feel suicidal now.

Hi. Just for the record before you read further, I am in no way going to harm or end myself, I'm actually 27 months clean of self-harm today. Anywho, thanks for signing up to read what's been a roller coaster of a "peaceful weekend". On my days off, I typically leave my house before anyone wakes up. Normally, staying home or sleeping in even as the second or third awake deems me a "lazy pig" or "dumb sh*t going nowhere in life.". I, 27 male, from WV... just can't find my way out, my escape if you will. My dad has assaulted/verbally abused/completely destroyed my mental health and self-love for myself, but you may be asking, then why the f*** is a 27 year old grown adult living at home? My mom has had dementia since my senior year of undergrad, and with both parents unemployed, it's me, the college professor taking care of two parents with no income. Anywho, today I came home a bit earlier from my morning escape than normal, simply to do that dreaded thing... my taxes. Money's always been an issue for me, simply because of the previously mentioned reason of me being the billpayer of the house, but also because I *have* been assaulted and kicked out by the abusive father before where I've experience homelessness throughout grad school in the midst of the COVID-19 pandemic, so yeah, there's roughly $9k in debt from hotel stays to keep myself hygienically sane along there as well. Anyway, back to today, I came home, and the ogre wanted to have a conversation. I simply was in no mood to talk but alas, I was followed around the house disrespected of my feelings mattering at all. This led to "why are you such a f******* no life and not listening to a word I say? You know, you're better off to just kill yourself." Words from my own parent. Great. Anywho, he "kicked me out" again when I told him "honestly given today's your daughter's birthday and mines in four days, maybe I should since you only care about your f***ing self", and left. So now I'm at my office, self-deemed homelessly sleeping here for the weekend.. but just looming with the thought of "how the hell do I move on from a parent INSISTING I kill myself?"

Thanks for reading. Especially from a mess of a 28 year old man.

I don’t know how to start this, and my feelings that I want to express are already fleeting. I’m a fifteen year old girl, diagnosed with Level 1 of Autism Spectrum Disorder, OCD, ADHD, Social Anxiety Disorder, and Depression. It affects my thoughts and life everyday, but I keep it all inside because I’m seen as still high-functioning and capable. Ever since Covid in 2020, everything changed which I’m not going to go into detail with but I had to go to day-treatment and therapy for a long time. I will never be the same and my mom painfully reminds me so. Right now I’m stressing about school. I’m a sophomore this year and I went to an orientation today. IT WAS THE WORSE! The building itself, the 800 other sophomores, the overcrowded gym, the bright lights, the loud music, the talking, the smell, just everything. I cried ten different times having a panic attack internally while trying to hold back my tears which made me want to cry even more. I just froze there until eventually a staff/teacher had to guide me, if they weren’t there I would have just stayed in one spot until everyone had left. It’s so humiliating to always be on the verge of tears and barely able to talk. The whole time I was thinking I couldn’t do this for the next three years or even another day of this. I think I’ll fall back into my bad habits of hurting and cutting myself or even suicide in a couple of months if I kept going to school. I know I sound ungrateful for hating school because not everyone has an opportunity to get an education. It’s not the education part, it's just being at the building. I would have no trouble if a tutor came to my house and teaches me everything. That’s what I want. But my parents would NEVER comply. For three years of middle school I’ve exposed myself nearly everyday to social situations and being with people but still I haven’t gotten used to it and I nearly cried every day and resulted in self-harm to get checked out. I don’t know what to do. I have to go back this Thursday and I just know it’s going to be a day full of tears and concerned teachers staring at me waiting for me to say something as I blankly stare at the ground with my face covered in tears and snot. I just want someone to love me. I’d do anything to have a companion that understands me, the real me, and accepts me. I would do anything. I would glow up and become a better person. I just want a hug only from that person. But the only thing I really want is just to be a little kid again. I can barely remember my childhood and it felt like it got cut off so early. I’ve been acting so adult from so young and now I want to be a child again. I want to be treated like a child. I want to give up control so my thoughts become numb and my mind and perspective wouldn’t be warped from all the media and unrestricted internet access from a young age.
 What should I do? I don’t know if you’re a real person or if you get paid to read this, but I’m sorry for typing so much. I wouldn’t know how to give advice to myself, I’m just so lost and selfish and I hate myself so much. Everything I do is cringe or wrong or hurt somebody else.

I've been in moderate to severe dental discomfort since August 5th, 2011. That's 13 years, 10 months, and 2 days ago. 
There have been times I'm my life when I've been debilitated by dental pain, but I've always recovered and bounced back.

2024 has been the worst year of my life. It's also been the best. I have finally found my family, after not having one since I was 15. But I've also spent now the last 2 months in pain at about a 4-5 out of 10. But this last 13 days have kept me stretched beyond my threshold for pain, sitting between a 7 and a 10 out of 10. I through this became aware that I have a dental abscess. It's worth mentioning at this point that I was raised in a cult. They didn't believe in modern medicine, least of all Fluoride. They also believed that the ideal compounds for cleansing one's teeth were tea tree and sugar. Yes. You read that correctly. 

Needless to say, l have spent the last 13+ years attempting to remedy the impacts of my childhood, which unfortunately did not stop at my teeth. 

Why am I writing all of this? 
I've got a self-proclaimed pain tolerance "of the gods". 
But I don't remember what it's like not to be in pain anymore. And my dentist has been patient and understanding. I'm paying off the work through a payment plan. But my front tooth has decided to die. And whilst it might seem defeatist or pessimistic of me to say; I am spent, exhausted, and defeated. I actually concede. Unfortunately, due to decisions I didn't make, and systems or hidden agendas that I lack an inherent understanding of, the collective sum of all of my life experiences and decisions won't even make it round to the 27th year. 

I don't want to die.
But this is where I am. I can't burden my fiancé, or my closest friend. I have no family, no siblings or parents to call on. I'm sorry

This is gonna make me sound really bratty, but these are my feelings an I don't want to be judged on them (this seems to be a very common occurrence for me). So for context, between my birthday and christmas within the past year I'd received 3 Amazon gift cards which alltogether added up to $100, and I was planning on using them to get myself a few things after this christmas with whatever other gift cards I would receive. Now onto the story I'm sharing: I'm in 2 secret Santas which I chose to be a part of because I was obviously unaware of the extreme financial struggles my family is going through atm (I'm only 14 right now). I told my mom who I had to get gifts for and what they wanted, and so she went on Amazon to get the gifts. She also got a gift for my other friend who I already know got me a really expensive gift. At the checkout, yes you guessed it, the price was $99 and a couple cents. My mom said that she didn't have enough money to get this and asked me to give her my wallet. I assumed she was just going to use one of the gift cards and then use her own to cover the rest of the cart since, as I mentioned before, I was unaware that we're actually poor and we actually are low on money. But to my surprise, she took out all 3 gift cards and proceeded to put them all into her computer before handing them back to me. I asked her, "How much money do I have left?" just to see if I had any that I could use on something small, like maybe $5 (nothing is $5 anymore who tf am I kidding) and she said "Oh well since there was tax I used all of it so you can just throw those out." When I tell you I was so frustrated, disappointed, and any other negative feelings you could think of. And I know this just makes me sound spoiled because, "Oh my goodness she doesn't care about her own families financial stability!"But if I'm being truthful, my first thought was "Well at least my friends will get their gifts and I'm the only one that is negatively affected in this situation." I'm not really sure what to put after that but overall I'm just upset that I saved these for months just to get all of them taken away in 10 minutes.

Yo, the cost of food in Bermuda is  focking outta control! This single mama is strugglin' to make ends meet.

As a 19 single mama, I'm no stranger to hustle. But nothing coulda prepared me for the crazy-high cost of groceries in Bermuda. Every trip to the store is a major stress sesh, a battle against a system that's tryna push me to the edge.

The prices are, like, totally off the charts. A loaf of bread is over $9,  milk is close to $10, and a pound of  facking chicken can set you back $15. And that's just for the basics, the essentials I need to feed my kid a decent meal. And don't even get me started on fruits and veggies, which are basically considered luxury items.

I'm not askin' for much. I just wanna be able to hook my son up with the grub he needs to grow and thrive. But with every passin' day, it feels like that dream is slippin' further and further away.

I'm tired of bein' told to "budget" and "make do." I'm tired of feelin' like I'm constantly fallin' behind, no matter how hard I try. I'm tired of bein' treated like a second-class citizen 'cause I'm a single mama.

I'm not just a statistic. I'm a real person, a mama, a survivor. And I'm not gonna give up without a fight. I demand better for myself, for my son, and for all the other families strugglin' to make ends meet in Bermuda.

We deserve affordable food. We deserve a fair shot at success. We deserve a Bermuda that works for everyone, not just the wealthy elite.

I don't know/care if anyone sees this or no one at all, I just to get it off my chest. I have two leopard geckos that live together, Lyra and Rexie. It's not ideal, I know that. I researched a lot, did everything, but when I bought them, the seller told me it was completely fine, and I believed it because he was (supposed to be) a professional. I've always had small issues with them, but it was fine until like 2 months ago. Then, they didn’t go into their humid hides anymore, and since then, they've had problems with shedding. I just thought at least Lyra was over her shed, but no, she just started again. They both do this. They shed over and over again. And then my mom or grandmother is like 'yeah but why, that can't be normal' EVERY DAY. And EVERY DAY I tell them "it isn't normal, but they struggle each time because they don't go into their humid hide". Idk what to do anymore. They get saunas every evening, I got shed aid that I massage them with, and I keep the enclosure sprayed every morning and evening and focus on the humid hide so it's like not dripping wet but wet enough all the time. And they don't use it. Still don't get better. Lyra still doesn't eat but she looks okay, underweight but still better than Rexie. I manage to force feed Rexie about 1-3 mealworm every second day or so, Lyra just spits them out. I give then their powder mixed in water so they get that at least. Only kind of positive thing is that both pooped yesterday and it looked ordinary. And what pisses me off the most is my mother will tell me "I'm so worried, they have to get better :(" like YES THEN LET ME GO TO A VET?? but no, she doesn't let me (i'm a minor and unable to get to a vet without a car, no busses go where i could find a vet, i'm not allowed to take trains and all alone, i'm stuck with what i'm doing). It just feels like I'm stuck. I know vet is the only way, but i tried everything several times. Said that I'll pay, that we'll find one, that we need a vet for them, but she doesn't listen, plays me off, no matter what i do, show her, or tell her. The only thing I can do is continue what I'm doing and hope my mother will realise it herself. The only other hope I can have is that they'll die before they suffer more, that their pain ends that way, as much as it hurts and brings me tears to even think about it. I've cried a lot the past weeks because of this, and I feel horrible every single day. Every single day, I rush to the enclosure when one of them is in basking position to see if they're really basking or if they died. I don't want them die, I love them woth all my heart, really, but some days, I really hope that they would instead of suffering in pain and discomfort. Lately, the only reason why i'm still here is because I know my mother wouldn't care nearly as much as I do, and I want to be there for my pets.
